1000653181.english: You can't die! Snap out of it, LRL!
1000653181.korean: 죽으면 안 돼! 정신 차려, LRL!

1000653182.english: Alvis team member! Shaking her any more could cause a concussion, so it's probably best to just leave her lying still.
1000653182.korean: 알비스 대원! 그 이상 흔들면 뇌진탕이 발생할 수 있으니, 그대로 눕혀두는 게 좋을 것 같아.

1000653183.english: Hello, Dragon-ah! I heard about you briefly.
1000653183.korean: 안녕, 용아! 너에 대한 건 간단하게 전해 들었어.

1000653184.english: You were sleeping here because of the self-check, right?
1000653184.korean: 자가점검 때문에 여기서 잠들어 있었던 거지?

1000653187.english: So, it's a resistance force led by humans...

1000653188.english: Oh, what's this? Did it really become that famous?

1000653189.english: Ah~! If I had known it would be like this, I would have taken a picture with you too! That's a shame!
1000653189.korean: 아~! 이럴 줄 알았으면 나도 옆에서 같이 찍을 걸! 아쉽다!

1000653190.english: That's right. You're on the PECS side... Wow?

1000653191.english: I'm just following the contract. My mission is to protect humans and what they leave behind from non-human entities.
1000653191.korean: 나는 계약을 따를 뿐이란다. 인외의 존재들로부터 인간과 인간이 남긴 것들을 수호하는 게 내 사명이지.

1000653192.english: They say PECS's lemonade is protecting humanity's legacy from being destroyed.
1000653192.korean: PECS의 레모네이드들이 파괴하는 인류의 유산을 보호하고 있단다.

1000653193.english: On the way here, I saw the marionettes lying on the ground.
1000653193.korean: 오면서 마리오네트들이 쓰러져 있는 걸 봤어.

1000653194.english: I thought it was evidence of a battle with Valhalla or our side, but if that's the case...
1000653194.korean: 발할라나 우리 쪽 애들과 교전한 흔적인 줄 알았는데, 그렇다면...

1000653195.english: I came here after hearing rumors that the Lemonade Delta was targeting this place, but... I missed the timing.
1000653195.korean: 레모네이드 델타가 이곳을 노린단 정보들 듣고 찾아왔지만... 시기를 놓쳤었지.

1000653196.english: To prevent the remaining Delta soldiers from attacking again, clear the area and, while you rest for a moment...
1000653196.korean: 남아있는 델타의 병사들이 재차 노리는 걸 막기 위해 주변을 정리하고, 잠시 쉬는 사이에...

1000653197.english: I've had the pleasure of meeting you all.

1000653198.english: Hmm... So, at least we're not enemies for now, right? Right?
1000653198.korean: 음... 그럼 일단 우리 적은 아니라는 거네? 그렇지?

1000653199.english: As the saying goes, the enemy of my enemy is my friend! We're colleagues, aren't we?
1000653199.korean: 적의 적은 아군이라는 말이 있으니까! 우리 동료인 거지!

1000653200.english: Alright~! Welcome to the official adventurer squad, Glacias!
1000653200.korean: 좋아~! 정식으로 모험단 대원이 된 걸 환영해, 글라시아스!

1000653201.english: Hmph, an adventure guild, eh? That sounds like it will be fun.

1000653202.english: Well, the princess is sleeping with a smile on her face. It doesn't seem like there's any problem.
1000653202.korean: 음, 공주님은 웃으면서 자고 있어. 별 문제는 없는 것 같아.

1000653203.english: As expected, I'm the perfect bodyguard.

1000653204.english: Come to think of it, that child...

1000653205.english: Do you know why you collapsed as soon as you saw me?
1000653205.korean: 어째서 나를 보자마자 쓰러진 것인지, 알고 있느냐.

1000653206.english: Oh, LRL? She carries the "Dragon Slayer" comic book with her everyplace, day and night, and even calls herself the Cyclops Princess... Hmm.
1000653206.korean: 아, LRL? 자나 깨나 "드래곤 슬레이어" 만화책을 들고 다니고, 자신을 사이클롭스 프린세스라 자칭할 정도로... 음.

1000653207.english: In short, I'm a huge fan!

1000653208.english: Hmph, I see. I understand what's going on.

1000653209.english: I was really excited to have found the real Glacias, but I guess my expectations were too high.
1000653209.korean: 진짜 글라시아스를 발견해서 들떠 있었는데, 기대감이 너무 컸나봐.

1000653210.english: But when did you and the Lemonades start to drift apart?

1000653212.english: Oh, it's okay if you don't want to talk...

1000653213.english: ... It's going to be a long story.

1000653214.english: Anyway, we have to wait until LRL breaks, and I'm also curious about what happened.
1000653214.korean: 어차피 LRL이 깰 때까지 기다려야 하고, 그리고 어떤 일들을 겪었는지 궁금하기도 하니까.

1000653215.english: Talking to the kids you meet during your exploration is also one of the true joys of exploration. Don't be shy, just speak freely!
1000653215.korean: 탐험 중에 만난 애들이랑 대화하는 시간도 탐험의 참된 재미 중 하나지. 사양 말고 편하게 얘기해줘!

1000653217.english: That happened in the Bering Strait...! What was I doing back then?
1000653217.korean: 베링 해협에서 그런 일이...! 그때 나는 뭐하고 있었더라.

1000653218.english: I was so focused on the story Glacias was telling that I didn't even realize it had gotten dark...
1000653218.korean: 글라시아스가 해주는 이야기에 집중했더니 어두워진 것도 몰랐네...

1000653219.english: But when is LRL going to happen?

1000653220.english: Hehe, she's sleeping with a smiling face.

1000653221.english: Should I wake her up now?

1000653222.english: No, it's okay. It's late, so let's camp here and stay the nite.
1000653222.korean: 아냐, 괜찮아. 시간이 늦었으니 여기서 야영하고 가자.

1000653223.english: Then tomorrow, you'll go to the captain with us and Dragon. How is it?
1000653223.korean: 그러고 나서 내일 우리랑 용이랑 함께 캡틴한테 가는 거야. 어때?

1000653224.english: Do the other members all agree too?

1000653225.english: It's so dark I can't see anything, so I guess there's nothing I can do. Okay.
1000653225.korean: 앞이 깜깜해서 아무것도 보이지 않으니 어쩔 수 없네. 알았어.

1000653226.english: Instead, let's contact the commander, as they might be worried. Triaina, haven't you reported yet?
1000653226.korean: 대신 사령관이 걱정하고 있을지도 모르니 연락해두자. 트리아이나, 아직 보고하지 않았지?

1000653227.english: Oh, right, I forgot! It's really fortunate that we have a meticulous Empress team member.
1000653227.korean: 아 참, 깜빡했다! 꼼꼼한 엠프리스 대원이 있어서 참 다행이란 말이야.

1000653228.english: I haven't given up my position as captain yet!
1000653228.korean: 나 아직 대장자리 포기 안 했거든!

1000653229.english: Since we're camping, here's the tent, tarp, and insulation I brought. And I'll have to take out the Fire Stick too.
1000653229.korean: 야영해야 되니까 챙겨온 텐트랑 방수포, 단열재. 그리고 파이어스틱까지 꺼내야겠다.

1000653230.english: Oh, can I try lighting that?
1000653230.korean: 앗, 그거 불 붙이는 거 내가 해봐도 돼?

1000653231.english: What Bheur-Big Sis was doing looked really fun! I'll try it, I want to try it!
1000653231.korean: 베라 언니가 하는 거, 되게 재밌어보였어! 해볼래, 해보고 싶어!

1000653232.english: Okay, but you have to be careful with your hands, right? You could get hurt.
1000653232.korean: 좋아, 대신 손 조심해야 돼? 다칠 수도 있어.

1000653233.english: But LRL, it really doesn't break... Hehe! I just had a good idea.
1000653233.korean: 그런데 LRL, 진짜 안 깨네... 헤헹! 좋은 생각 났어.

1000653234.english: Glacias, could you do me a favor?

1000653236.english: If LRL wakes up, can you really treat her like a Cyclops Princess?
1000653236.korean: LRL이 깨어나면 정말 사이클롭스 프린세스처럼 대해줄 수 있어?

1000653237.english: It'll be an amazing gift for LRL, who's a Dragon Slayer fan! And on top of that, we have fun too!
1000653237.korean: 드래곤 슬레이어의 팬인 LRL에게 엄청난 선물이 될 거야! 덤으로 우리도 재밌고!

1000653238.english: That's amazing! So, Glacias came from another dimension?
1000653238.korean: 대단해! 그럼 글라시아스는 다른 차원에서 넘어왔단 말이야?

1000653240.english: Glacius, who came from another dimension, made a contract with the Dragon Slayer and vowed to exterminate the evil dragons.
1000653240.korean: 다른 차원에서 넘어온 글라시아스는 용살자와 계약을 맺고, 악룡의 멸절을 다짐했지.

1000653241.english: In that process, the Cyclops Princess... Um... When was it with Peregrinus again...?
1000653241.korean: 그 과정에서 사이클롭스 프린세스가... 어... 페레그리누스랑은 언제였더라...

1000653242.english: Child of noble lineage, you joined first, and Peregrinus joined later.
1000653242.korean: 고귀한 혈통의 아이야, 그대가 먼저 합류하고 페레그리누스가 나중에 합류했지.

1000653243.english: ... As expected, Glacias. The princess of the True Ancestors bows before your brilliance!
1000653243.korean: ...역시 글라시아스. 진조의 프린세스는 그대의 총명함에 경의를 표하노라!

1000653245.english: While traveling the world and defeating evil dragons one by one...
1000653245.korean: 전 세계를 여행하면서 하나 둘씩 악룡들을 물리치다...

1000653246.english: Finally, we even took down Nidhogg!

1000653248.english: So, who did the most amazing thing? Who was the best?
1000653248.korean: 그럼 누가 제일 대단한 일을 한 거야? 누가 제일 뛰어났어?

1000653250.english: Dragon Slayer, Glacias, and... At that time, the characters, um...
1000653250.korean: 용살자랑, 글라시아스랑... 그 때 등장인물들이, 어...

1000653251.english: Who was assigned the more important task, who did the more significant work?
1000653251.korean: 누가 더 중요한 일을 맡았는지, 누가 더 대단한 일을 했는지.

1000653252.english: We promised each other not to compare ourselves and to focus only on our own missions.
1000653252.korean: 우리들끼리 우열을 가리지 않고, 자신의 사명에만 집중하자며 약속했단다.

1000653253.english: Because we knew that without any one of us, nothing could be accomplished.
1000653253.korean: 왜냐면 우리 중에 누구 하나 없어선 그 무엇도 해낼 수 없으리란 걸 알고 있었으니까.

1000653254.english: Haha, I miss those days. Isn't that right, child of noble lineage?
1000653254.korean: 후후, 그때 그 시절이 그립구나. 그렇지 않느냐, 고귀한 혈통의 아이야.

1000653255.english: ... Even now, when I close my eyes, that time comes back vividly.
1000653255.korean: ...아직도 눈을 감으면 그 때가 선명히 떠오르지.

1000653256.english: Oh, and Glacias! The princess of the True Ancestors has a new hobby!
1000653256.korean: 아 참, 글라시아스여! 진조의 프린세스에게 새로운 취미가 생겼노라!

1000653257.english: That's the picture you were drawing yesterday!

1000653258.english: You brought that all the way here?

1000653260.english: Hahaha, I knew this day would come, having traversed the eons...
1000653260.korean: 후후후, 짐은 영겁의 시간을 넘어오며 오늘이 찾아올 걸 이미 알고 있었으니...

1000653261.english: How about that! Didn't I draw it exactly like you?

1000653262.english: ... Huh? It looks like this was painted brown instead of gold.
1000653262.korean: ...어? 여기 금색이 아니라 갈색으로 칠한 것 같은데.

1000653263.english: Hmm, is it just because it's dark that it looks that way?

1000653265.english: Uh...? It's true. Why did I only paint this part wrong...? Heeing...
1000653265.korean: 어...? 진짜네. 왜 여기만 잘못 칠했지... 히잉...

1000653266.english: ... After the battle with the evil dragon, we would often be covered in ash and dust.
1000653266.korean: ...악룡과의 전투가 끝나면 재와 먼지에 몸이 뒤덮이곤 했지.

1000653267.english: So you've even expressed those minute details.

1000653269.english: This badge and card here, and hee hee...
1000653269.korean: 여기 있는 이 뱃지랑 카드랑, 히힛...

1000653271.english: ... Alvis, you always sleep at this time, so you must be getting sleepy.
1000653271.korean: ...알비스, 늘 이 시간에 자서 슬슬 졸려.

1000653272.english: Sorry, I have to go first... Hmm...

1000653274.english: The chance to actually meet Glacias is rare... Yawn...
1000653274.korean: 진짜 글라시아스랑 만날 수 있는 기회는 흔치... 흐아암...

1000653275.english: It's late, so go to sleep.

1000653276.english: I'd like to talk more, but... There's still a lot I haven't shown you yet.
1000653276.korean: 좀 더 이야기하고 싶은데... 아직 보여주지 못한 게 많아.

1000653277.english: While at the lighthouse, I met with the commander... Even what's happened until now... Yawn...
1000653277.korean: 등대에 있다가 사령관이랑 만나서... 지금까지 있던 일도... 하암...

1000653278.english: Let's save the rest of the story for next time.

1000653279.english: Still... If I wake up tomorrow and Glacias isn't there...

1000653281.english: ...... Yeah. The commander too... Because you've always been there...

1000653286.english: Yeah. I think I'll have to stand watch. I just took a look around, and there are still quite a few traces of Iron Blooded and Marionettes nearby.
1000653286.korean: 응. 아무래도 불침번을 서야겠어. 한 번 둘러보고 왔는데, 아직 근처에 철충이랑 마리오네트의 흔적이 꽤 남아있더라고.

1000653287.english: It was unbelievable that you handled that many of them on your own.
1000653287.korean: 네가 그만한 수를 혼자 상대했다는 게 믿기지 않을 정도였어.

1000653288.english: I was simply faithful to my mission.

1000653289.english: ... But, are you really going to come with us tomorrow morning?
1000653289.korean: ...그런데, 정말 내일 아침에 우리랑 함께 갈 거야?

1000653290.english: Actually, you're hesitating to meet the commander, aren't you?
1000653290.korean: 사실 사령관이랑 만나는 걸 망설이고 있잖아.

1000653291.english: ... May I ask why you thought that?

1000653292.english: Because even tho I knew there were living humans, I didn't join them right away.
1000653292.korean: 살아있는 인간이 있단 걸 알면서도 바로 합류하지 않았으니까.

1000653293.english: ...or regretting the contract they made with the human PECS chairmen... Furthermore, it seemed like it didn't want to meet humans.
1000653293.korean: 인간인 PECS 회장들과 맺은 계약을 후회하고 있거나... 더 나아가선 인간과의 만남을 원치 않는 걸로 보였어.

1000653297.english: I had many conversations with this child, who resembled the princess of the Jin clan.
1000653297.korean: 진조의 공주와 닮은 이 아이와 많은 이야기를 나누었다.

1000653298.english: You've been alone in the lighthouse for many long years. She said she read the Dragon Slayer book until it was worn out there.
1000653298.korean: 등대에 홀로 남아 오랜 세월을 보내왔더구나. 그곳에서 드래곤 슬레이어의 책을 닳도록 읽었다고 말했다.

1000653299.english: In front of that child... When we talk about the appearance of humans and what they have done...
1000653299.korean: 그랬던 아이 앞에... 인간이 나타나고, 그 인간이 어떤 일을 해왔는지 이야기할 땐...

1000653300.english: Her eyes were shining brightly, just like when I first saw her...
1000653300.korean: 처음 날 보았을 때처럼 눈망울을 초롱초롱하게 빛내고 있었지...

1000653302.english: And beside that, this white child and the one who said they were the expedition leader were both laughing as they talked about the things they've experienced with humans.
1000653302.korean: 게다가 이 하얀 아이도 그렇고, 탐험대장이라고 했던 아이도 인간과 함께 겪어온 일들을 웃으면서 이야기하더구나.

1000653303.english: I've never met a Bioroid who spoke positively about their master before...
1000653303.korean: 지금까지 한번도 자신의 주인을 긍정적으로 얘기하는 바이오로이드를 만난 적 없었거늘...

1000653304.english: You're not the owner. It's the commander.

1000653305.english: Even if we can't refuse human commands, we shouldn't be treated like objects... Treat me like a human.
1000653305.korean: 우리가 인간의 명령을 거부할 수 없어도, 물건처럼 다루지 않고... 인간처럼 대우해줘.

1000653306.english: When she's in a bad mood, she's a real grump! Still...

1000653307.english: I want to do anything for you... That's the kind of person they are.

1000653309.english: Heh heh, child. You have feelings for him, don't you?
1000653309.korean: 후후, 아이야. 그에게 연심을 품고 있구나.

1000653310.english: That's not what it is! Just, uh?! Someone who gives you strength just by being near you? Um, you want to help?!
1000653310.korean: 그그그그런 거 아니야! 그냥, 어?! 약간 곁에 있으면 힘이 나는? 그, 도와주고 싶은?!

1000653311.english: It's a bit cool while also being protective... Ah, I don't know, but that's the gist of it!
1000653311.korean: 보호욕구를 자극하면서, 약간 멋있... 아아~ 몰라, 아무튼 그런 거야!

1000653312.english: Heh heh, when dawn breaks, let's go to the ark together. Perhaps it's because I've heard your stories...
1000653312.korean: 후후, 날이 밝으면 함께 방주로 가자꾸나. 그대들의 이야기를 들어서인지...

1000653313.english: I really wanted to meet the last human, just once.
1000653313.korean: 꼭 한번, 마지막 인간을 만나보고 싶어졌단다.

1000653314.english: ... I won't regret it. And it's not likely to happen anyway.
1000653314.korean: ...후회하진 않을 거야. 그럴 일도 없을 테고.

1000653316.english: Rasping away! Maybe it's because I slept on the bare floor with just insulation spread out, but my whole body feels stiff.
1000653316.korean: 으다다닷! 맨바닥에 단열재만 펴놓고 자서 그런가, 온몸이 뻐근하네.

1000653317.english: Oh my, my body aches... Empress. Please massage me.
1000653317.korean: 아이고, 삭신이야... 엠프리스 대원. 나 좀 주물러줘.

1000653318.english: Are you talking to me while I'm on night watch alone?
1000653318.korean: 지금 혼자 불침번 선 나한테 하는 소리야?

1000653319.english: I tried waking you up and shaking you so I could take over, but you wouldn't wake up!
1000653319.korean: 교대좀 하려고 아무리 깨우고 흔들어도 안 일어났어, 너!

1000653320.english: Huh? Oh, come to think of it. I was wondering why you didn't wake me up, but weren't you being considerate?
1000653320.korean: 응? 아~ 그러고 보니. 왜 안 깨웠나 했는데, 배려해준 거 아니었어?

1000653321.english: Empress is probably the only member who worries about the expedition leader this much. As expected of the best member!
1000653321.korean: 탐험대장을 이렇게 걱정해주는 건 엠프리스 대원밖에 없을 거야. 역시 최고의 대원!

1000653322.english: So please massage my shoulders. Huh? I'm begging you!
1000653322.korean: 그러니까 어깨 좀 주물러줘. 응? 부탁할게!

1000653323.english: ...Okay, but instead, I'm the boss from now on. Got it?
1000653323.korean: ...좋아, 그 대신 이제부터 대장은 나야. 알겠지?

1000653324.english: From now on, night watch is your responsibility, Triaina...!

1000653325.english: Yum yum... Hehe, I'm glad I brought lots of chocolate bars.
1000653325.korean: 냠냠... 히힛, 초코바 많이 가져와서 다행이다.

1000653327.english: Mumbling... Hahaha! As expected of the White Beast of the True Ancestors, you are thoroughly prepared!
1000653327.korean: 우물우물... 후후후! 역시 진조의 하얀 야수, 준비성이 철저하구나!

1000653328.english: Wait, did Andvari really give us this much? It seems like she brought a ton.
1000653328.korean: 그런데 안드바리가 이렇게나 많이 준 거야? 엄청 많이 가져왔던데.

1000653330.english: When have we ever brought this with permission?
1000653330.korean: 우리가 언제 허락 받고 가져온 적 있어?

1000653332.english: I... I have enough. I think I can stop eating now.
1000653332.korean: 지, 짐은 이만하면 됐느니라. 그만 먹어도 될 것 같구나.

1000653333.english: ...And how many chocolate bars are left? I think I should return at least a little.
1000653333.korean: ...그리고 초코바, 얼마나 남았어? 조금이라도 돌려놔야 할 것 같아.

1000653334.english: Yeah, there isn't much left now! I gave a lot to my older sisters.
1000653334.korean: 응, 이제 얼마 안 남았어! 언니들한테 좀 많이 나눠줬거든.

1000653335.english: ...You have crossed the point of no return.

1000653336.english: Glacias, don't you need to eat anything? Aren't you hungry?
1000653336.korean: 글라시아스는 뭐 안 먹어도 돼? 배고프지 않아?

1000653337.english: Thank you for worrying about me. But I'm fine.

1000653338.english: The weather has cleared up and the destination is set, so I guess I just need to follow the wind.
1000653338.korean: 날도 개었고, 목적지도 정해졌으니 바람을 따라 가면 되겠지.

1000653342.english: Today, I intend to soar together with you and your family.
1000653342.korean: 오늘은 그대와 그대의 권속들과 함께 날아오르려한다.

1000653344.english: Wow~! I want to ride it! I've really wanted to try riding Alvis!
1000653344.korean: 와아~! 탈래! 알비스는 꼭 타보고 싶었어!

1000653345.english: What are you doing, LRL? Come here quickly!

1000653347.english: Heehee... The dream I had at the lighthouse actually came true...
1000653347.korean: 히잉... 등대에서 꾸던 꿈이 실제로 이뤄졌어...

1000653348.english: Ah, White Beast! The very front seat belongs to the Princess of the True Ancestors!
1000653348.korean: 앗, 하얀 야수여! 맨 앞자리는 진조의 프린세스의 차지이니라!

1000653349.english: Huh? The kids are waving from Glacias's back? Looks like they're trying to fly to the Ark of Memories.
1000653349.korean: 어? 애들이 글라시아스 등 위에서 손 흔드는데? 기억의 방주까지 날아가려나봐.

1000653350.english: Should we return for now, Triaina?

1000653351.english: Ugh... Yeah, let's go back to the captain and do a mid-term check.
1000653351.korean: 으어어... 그래, 한번 캡틴에게 돌아가서 중간 점검하자.

1000653353.english: Huh? What? Is this enough of a massage? Then I'm the boss now?
1000653353.korean: 어? 뭐야, 마사지 이거면 충분해? 그럼 이제 내가 대장이다?

1000653354.english: ...No, wait a minute. Did you happen to see it? Surely you weren't... from the beginning, too... So that's why you suggested camping...
1000653354.korean: ...아니, 잠시만. 혹시 봤었어? 설마 처음부터 너도... 그래서 야영하자고...

1000653355.english: You were awake back then! You just pretended to be asleep on purpose even when I woke you up!
1000653355.korean: 그 때 일어나있었지! 깨워도 일부러 자는 척했던 거지!

1000653356.english: On top of that, you called me a member again...! Triaina, aren't you stopping right there?!
1000653356.korean: 게다가 또 대원이라고 불렀어...! 트리아이나, 거기 안 서?!

1000653359.english: Heh heh heh! If I set my mind to it, I could fly much higher and faster than this!
1000653359.korean: 큭.큭.큭! 맘만 먹으면 이것보다 훨씬 더 높이, 더 빨리 날 수 있지!

1000653360.english: Is it not so, O Glacias!

1000653361.english: It is no different from what a child of noble lineage said. However...
1000653361.korean: 고귀한 혈통의 아이가 말한 것과 다름이 없다. 그런데...

1000653362.english: A Bioroid is engaging a lone Iron Bug (Iron Bug) on the front. If by any chance you are acquainted...
1000653362.korean: 전방에서 한 바이오로이드가 홀로 철충과 교전중이다. 혹시 면식이 있는 사이라면...

1000653363.english: Huh? That redhead, isn't that the guy from last time?
1000653363.korean: 어? 저 빨간머리, 저번에 걔 아냐?

1000653364.english: I think that's the kid who fought the Iron Bugs with wires and explosives.
1000653364.korean: 와이어랑 폭발물로 철충이랑 싸우던 애, 맞는 거 같은데?

1000653365.english: ...That's why I can't stop exploring. Dragon-ah!

1000653366.english: Can you help her with us? Please!
1000653366.korean: 우리랑 같이 쟤를 도와줄 수 있어? 부탁할게!

1000653368.english: Hold on tight so you don't fall when landing.
1000653368.korean: 착륙할 때 떨어지지 않도록 꼭 붙잡거라.

1000653370.english: Huh? Just a moment. Where are you going without saying a word? There might be more Iron Blooded Ones ahead.
1000653370.korean: 어? 잠깐만. 말도 없이 어딜 가려고. 이 앞에 또 철충이 있을지 몰라.

1000653371.english: Come with us to a safe place.

1000653372.english: Oh dear, oh dear. Empress crew member. That's not how you talk when recruiting someone.
1000653372.korean: 이런, 이런. 엠프리스 대원. 누군가를 영입할 땐 그렇게 말하는 게 아니야.

1000653373.english: Look, the essential qualities of a leader. How to recruit adventure party members.
1000653373.korean: 봐봐, 대장으로서의 필수덕목. 모험단 대원을 영입하는 방법.

1000653376.english: This isn't working. Ugh, that's a shame. Then let's try the next method...
1000653376.korean: 이건 안 먹히는군. 크으~ 아쉽다. 그럼 다음 방법으로...

1000653377.english: Instead of saying thank you to us for helping, what's with saying we're noisy?
1000653377.korean: 도와준 우리한테 고맙다고는 못 할망정 시끄럽다고 하는 건 뭐야!

1000653378.english: Even so, that's too much... Huh? Where are you going while I'm talking?
1000653378.korean: 아무리 그래도 너무한 거... 어? 말하고 있는 데 어디 가.

1000653381.english: That scar on your arm... We have seen it before.
1000653381.korean: 팔에 그 상처... 짐은 본 적이 있다.

1000653382.english: You were attacked by the remnants of the evil dragon! It's extremely dangerous!

1000653384.english: If you leave it as it is, it will become a fatal curse that eats away at life!
1000653384.korean: 그대로 놔두면 생명을 좀먹는 치명적인 저주가 되지!

1000653385.english: Will you not come with Us and Our familiars? My kin can cure any illness!
1000653385.korean: 짐과 짐의 사역마들과 함께 가지 않겠느냐? 내 권속은 어떤 병이든 치료할 수 있으니까!

1000653388.english: But, but... The commander said to bring back any injured ones we find...
1000653388.korean: 하, 하지만... 사령관이 다친 애를 발견하면 데려오라고 했단 말이야...

1000653391.english: That's right, that's right. The commander definitely said something like that.
1000653391.korean: 맞아, 맞아. "사령관"이 분명 그런 말을 했었지.

1000653392.english: I told them to bring you to the "Commander" immediately, even for a simple wound, before it becomes a fatal curse. That's right, Princess of the True Ancestors?
1000653392.korean: 간단한 상처라도 치명적인 저주가 되기 전에 "사령관"한테 반드시 데려와달라고 그랬어. 그렇지, 진조의 프린세스?

1000653393.english: Um... Hmph, of course, isn't it obvious?

1000653394.english: I will definitely bring you before the retinue of the princess of this true ancestor!
1000653394.korean: 반드시 이 진조의 프린세스의 권속 앞에 데려갈 것이다!

1000653395.english: What do you mean, just like that...!

1000653396.english: Empress crew! I just asked, and they said the "Commander" is in the Memory Ark.
1000653396.korean: 엠프리스 대원! 지금 물어보니까, "사령관"은 기억의 방주에 있다는데.

1000653397.english: If I go now, I can see the "commander" right away, right?
1000653397.korean: 지금 가면 바로 "사령관"을 볼 수 있겠어, 그렇지?

1000653398.english: If we're lucky, maybe we can get treated when we're alone together?
1000653398.korean: 운이 좋으면 단 둘이 있을 때 치료받을 수 있겠는데?

1000653400.english: You guys, you've been doing this on purpose since earlier...!

1000653401.english: There's only one way to overcome the fear of something you haven't experienced.
1000653401.korean: 겪어보지 못한 것에 대한 두려움을 극복할 수 있는 방법은 한 가지밖에 없단다.

1000653403.english: Experiencing it firsthand and realizing what it is.
1000653403.korean: 직접 겪어보고, 그게 무엇인지 깨닫는 것.

1000653404.english: As for how to do that... I don't think I need to explain it.
1000653404.korean: 그러기 위해서 어떻게 해야 하는지는... 굳이 설명하지 않아도 될 것 같구나.

1000653407.english: ... I'm just going to say hello.

1000653409.english: This expedition has been nothing but successful, it's almost scary! What will happen in the next exploration!
1000653409.korean: 이번 탐험은 성공만 가득 해서 무서울 정도야! 다음 탐험엔 또 어떤 일이 벌어질까!

1000653410.english: I'm glad you helped Glacias persuade them.

1000653411.english: If we had just left her alone, she would have been wandering around by herself like a penguin that had lost its flock.
1000653411.korean: 가만히 놔뒀으면 쟤, 무리를 잃은 펭귄처럼 혼자 다녔겠지.

1000653412.english: Let's put off the "what ifs" for now... Oh, right!
1000653412.korean: 만약의 경우는 만약으로 미뤄두고... 아, 맞다!

1000653413.english: I forgot to grab the treasure!

1000653415.english: Just some junk rolling around on the ground here...

1000653416.english: You don't know what you're talking about!

1000653417.english: It's not the function of an object that determines its value, it's up to us.
1000653417.korean: 가치를 판단하는 건 물건의 기능이 아니야, 우리 몫이지.

1000653418.english: In that sense, this is a treasure more precious than any gold or jewels!
1000653418.korean: 그런 의미에서 이건 어떤 금은보화보다 귀한 보물이야!

1000653420.english: Okay, let's pick out the ones that are still good from what's here.
1000653420.korean: 좋아, 여기 있는 것들 중에 멀쩡한 걸 골라가자.

1000653422.english: Hehe, you’ve fallen for my cooking skills, haven’t you? All that cramming all night for days paid off— ah. Not that… Actually it’s true. Aside from the cafe, I wanted to show Master a wonderful side of me and capture your heart. Really...? You’re really into me? Hehe, I knew it. From now on, if there’s anything you want to eat, just tell me. Me...? If Master wishes, that’s fine...
1000653422.korean: 후후, 역시 내 요리 솜씨에 반해버린거지? 며칠동안 밤새면서 벼락치기한 보람이- 앗.&n그, 그게 아니라… 있지... 사실 맞아. 카페도 카페지만, 주인님한테 멋진 모습을 보여주고 마음을 사로잡고 싶었어. 진짜...?&n진짜 나한테 푹 빠졌어? 헤헷, 역시 그럴 줄 알았어. 앞으로도 먹고 싶은 게 있으면 얼마든지 말해.&n엣, 나...? 주, 주인님이 원하시면 괜찮아... 요...​

1000653423.english: Hehe, at last this day has come. An eternal vow with a vassal— ...No, I won’t listen. What I need now... is you who promises an eternal vow before me 'now'. The one I will swear an eternal vow to is... you who stand before me now. Understand? Heh heh, good. Then I will proceed with the vow. Now, vassal. Do you swear to leave the yoke of fate behind and share joys and sorrows with me, Cyclops Princess? …...Good. And... let this stand in for my vow.
1000653423.korean: 후후, 마침내 이 날이 왔구나. 권속과의 영원한 서약을- ...아니, 듣지 않겠다. 지금 짐에게&n필요한 것은... '지금' 짐의 앞에서 영원한 서약을 약속하는 그대일 뿐이니까. 짐이 영원한 서약을 맹세하려는 대상은...&n지금, 짐의 앞에 있는 바로 그대니까. 이해하겠느냐? 큭큭, 좋다. 그렇다면 맹세를 진행하도록 하지. 자아, 권속이여.&n그대는 운명의 굴레를 벗어나서 짐, 사이클롭스 프린세스와 고락을 함께할 것을 맹세하는가? …...좋다. 그리고... 짐의 맹세는, 이걸로 대신하도록 하지.

1000653424.english: Commander... no, Brother... this is real, not a joke, right? You always make me blueberry smoothies whenever you see me... then you compliment my clothes... I couldn't stand it because I started caring only about Brother... alright. You promised to make me happy, right? I'll do the same for you.
1000653424.korean: 사령관님... 아니, 오빠야... 진짜가, 농담 아니제? 맨날 내만 보면 블루베리스무디 해달라 카고…&n그러다가도 옷 예쁘다고 칭찬해주고… 언제부터 오빠야만 신경 쓰여가 견딜 수 없었는데... 알았다.&n행복하게 해준다 캤제? 내도 그래 해줄게.

1000653427.english: Ugh... I guess that's how it is. Then again, they aren't the type to just let something like that slide.
1000653427.korean: 으… 역시 그런가. 하긴, 그런 걸 대충 놔둘 인물들이 아니지.

1000653428.english: That's right. Far from being a marionette, even the past data related to PECS has been thoroughly tampered with.
1000653428.korean: 그렇죠. 마리오네트는커녕, PECS와 관련된 과거 자료들도 아주 철저하게 변조해뒀어요.

1000653430.english: At this point, it’s practically no different from deletion, but... here you go.
1000653430.korean: 이정도면 삭제랑 다를 것도 없겠지만… 여기요.

1000653432.english: It is to the extent that they have rewritten not only the actions and deeds of the chairmen and themselves, but also the modern history before the apocalypse and the history after the outbreak of the war of destruction.
1000653432.korean: 회장들과 자신들의 행보와 행적은 물론, 멸망 전의 현대사, 그리고 멸망 전쟁 발발 후의 역사를 새로 쓴 수준이에요.

1000653433.english: That must be the purpose, right?

1000653434.english: That's right. They 'accidentally' discover the Ark at the right time and reveal the records from there.
1000653434.korean: 그렇죠. 적당한 시기에 ‘우연히’ 방주를 발견하고, 그곳의 기록을 공개하는 거죠.

1000653435.english: It’s obvious, but effective. Generally, given the high credibility of the facility known as the Ark of Memory, the impact is bound to be significant.
1000653435.korean: 뻔하지만 효과적이야. 일반적으로 기억의 방주라는 시설의 신뢰도가 높은 만큼 파급력도 크겠지.

1000653436.english: Sigh... For now, I've only added comments to the relevant materials. I need to hear your opinion later regarding deletion.
1000653436.korean: 하아… 일단 관련 자료에는 주석만 달아놨어요. 삭제는 나중에 주인님의 의견을 들어봐야 하니까요.

1000653438.english: You're welcome. How is the analysis of the marionette going?

1000653439.english: Hmm... nothing has been added compared to when I first saw it. It's unbelievably simple and efficient.
1000653439.korean: 음… 처음 봤을 때랑 비교해서 추가적으로 나온 건 없어. 말도 안 될 정도로 단순하고 효율적이야.

1000653440.english: Artificial life forms created using a small amount of Origin Dust and organic compounds…
1000653440.korean: 소량의 오리진 더스트와 유기 화합물을 이용해 만들어낸 인공 생명체…

1000653441.english: Both the organs and body parts are developed just enough to maintain life activities and perform their assigned duties.
1000653441.korean: 장기도 신체 부위도 딱 생명 활동을 유지하고, 맡은 임무를 수행할 정도로만 발달되어 있어.

1000653442.english: And yet, the genetic structure is molded with hysterical precision...
1000653442.korean: 그러면서도 유전자 구조는 히스테릭할 정도로 섬세하게 성형되어있고…

1000653443.english: I hate to admit it, but from a biotechnological perspective, there probably aren't many bioroids higher in level than this.
1000653443.korean: 인정하기는 싫지만 생명공학적으로 봤을 때, 이것보다 수준이 높은 바이오로이드는 얼마 없을 거야.

1000653444.english: Because Delta's Kestos Himas is a δ type.

1000653445.english: Delta designs not only clothes… but genes.

1000653446.english: Hmm. I'm sorry to Alpha, but specializing the Kestos Himas according to the alphabet, and the Seven Deadly Sins... honestly, it's such bad taste.
1000653446.korean: 음. 알파 언니한테는 미안하지만, 그 케스토스 히마스를 알파벳에 따라 특성화한 것도 그렇고 칠죄종도 그렇고… 솔직히 너무 악취미야.

1000653447.english: There is no need to feel sorry. I think so too.
1000653447.korean: 미안해할 거 없어요. 저도 그렇게 생각하니까요.

1000653448.english: However, I think there is a reason.

1000653449.english: The reason? Isn't it just a matter of taste?

1000653450.english: The more a person has to lose, the greater the fear lurking within them.
1000653450.korean: 그런 잃을 게 많은 인간일수록 내면에 잠재된 두려움이 크거든요.

1000653451.english: They are afraid that the world around them might collapse at any moment, so they cannot endure without attaching meaning to every single thing.
1000653451.korean: 자신을 둘러싼 세상이 언제 무너질지 두려워서, 하나하나에 의미를 두지 않고서는 버티지 못하는 거예요.

1000653452.english: Hmm... I still don't understand. The humanities are just so difficult.
1000653452.korean: 으음… 역시 이해가 안 돼. 인문학은 영 어렵단 말야.

1000653453.english: Oh my, is that so, Dr. Yang?

1000653454.english: Just knowing something is different from understanding it, right? My head goes "Oh, I see," but it doesn't really sink in.
1000653454.korean: 그냥 아는 거랑 이해하는 거랑은 다르잖아? 머리로는 아 그렇구나~ 하는데 와닿지가 않아.

1000653455.english: Haha, still, I think Dr. Yang is emotional and human for a scientist.
1000653455.korean: 후후, 그래도 닥터 양은 과학자치고는 감성적이고 인간적이라고 생각해요.

1000653456.english: After all, before I am a scientist, I am my older brother's younger sister.
1000653456.korean: 그야 난 과학자이기 이전에 오빠 여동생이니까~

1000653457.english: Hehe, I want to take a nap while hugging you, big brother.
1000653457.korean: 헤헷, 오빠 끌어안고 낮잠 자고 싶다.

1000653458.english: Why don't you go? You're on vacation right now, Master.

1000653460.english: Hehe, thanks, sis. How about you?

1000653461.english: It's work hours for me. Miss Armand asked me to monitor the reconnaissance unit.
1000653461.korean: 저는 업무 시간이라서요. 아르망 양에게 정찰 부대 모니터링을 부탁받았어요.

1000653462.english: I see. Well then, see you later.

1000653463.english: Ah, holding it in too much isn't good for your health, so don't push yourself too hard~
1000653463.korean: 아, 너무 참는 건 몸에 안좋으니까 무리하지 말구~

1000653465.english: Slowly, it might be the limit...

1000653466.english: - After being attacked by the doctor in the captain's cabin and forced to take a nap with her, I returned to the Ark.
1000653466.korean: - 함장실에서 닥터에게 습격당해 반강제로 함께 낮잠을 자고 난 뒤 다시 방주로 돌아왔다.

1000653467.english: - In terms of frequency, I'm being attacked by someone almost once or twice an hour.
1000653467.korean: - 빈도로 따지자면 거의 시간당 한 두번은 누군가에게 습격당하고 있다.

1000653468.english: - I kept my senses sharp, ready to respond at any moment, and headed toward the information zone where I've been spending most of my time lately.
1000653468.korean: - 언제든지 대응할 수 있도록 촉각을 곤두세우며, 요새 주로 시간을 보내는 정보 구역으로 향했다

1000653469.english: Hahaha! Oh my, that's the fBig Sisst thing I've ever heard in my life.

1000653470.english: Oh, you're just in time. Hey, buddy! Come over here quickly!
1000653470.korean: 오, 마침 왔군. 어이, 친구! 빨리 이리로 와봐!

1000653471.english: Hahaha, you'll regret it if you miss this!

1000653472.english: Hahaha! Big Sister, do you think you can even fight properly looking like that?
1000653472.korean: 푸하하하하! 누님, 그 꼴로 제대로 싸울 수나 있겠수?

1000653473.english: - Next to Peregrinus, who was laughing maniacally…

1000653475.english: - … There was a humanoid robot I had never seen before.

1000653476.english: - But if it's my older sister...?

1000653479.english: Ah, you're trying to project a benevolent image again.
1000653479.korean: 아, 또 인자한 이미지 메이킹 하시는구만.

1000653480.english: Where did all that restlessness from just a moment ago go?
1000653480.korean: 좀 전까지만 해도 안절부절하던 건 다 어디로 갔수?

1000653481.english: That was certainly the case, but seeing Maeng-u opened my eyes.
1000653481.korean: 분명 그랬지만, 맹우를 보니 시야가 트였다.

1000653484.english: Azaz and Dr. Yang made a new body for me.
1000653484.korean: 아자즈와 닥터 양이 새로운 몸을 만들어 주었단다.

1000653485.english: - As soon as I heard their names, strangely enough, I immediately understood.
1000653485.korean: - 그 둘의 이름을 듣자마자 이상하게도 바로 납득해버렸다.

1000653486.english: As Peregrinus said, it was tricky at first... Hehe.

1000653487.english: - Glacias took a step toward me. Her clear blue eyes seemed to be smiling.
1000653487.korean: - 글라시아스는 내게 한 걸음 다가섰다. 투명한 푸른 눈이 웃음 짓는 것처럼 보였다.

1000653488.english: I am truly glad. That I can now speak with you at the same eye level.
1000653488.korean: 정말로 기쁘구나. 이렇게 그대와 같은 눈높이에서 이야기할 수 있게 되었으니.

1000653490.english: But, older sister, are you okay? Just by looking at you, your functions and output seem weaker than your old body.
1000653490.korean: 근데 누님, 괜찮수? 딱 봐도 예전 몸보다 기능이나 출력이 약해보이는데.

1000653491.english: Although I was told there wouldn't be much difference between Azaz and Dr. Yang... I guess I'll need to get used to it.
1000653491.korean: 아자즈와 닥터 양이 별 차이 없을 거라고는 했지만… 익숙해질 필요는 있을 것 같구나.

1000653492.english: Then let's stop filming the melodrama and go out and help out. That's okay, right, friend?
1000653492.korean: 그럼 멜로 그만 찍고 나가서 일손이나 도웁시다. 괜찮지, 친구?

1000653493.english: Wow, you're totally living the good life. I'm so jealous.
1000653493.korean: 캬, 아주 팔자 좋구만. 부럽다, 부러워.

1000653496.english: heard you are finally on vacation. We will lend a hand, so please rest well.
1000653496.korean: 모처럼의 휴가라고 들었는데, 우리도 힘을 보탤 테니 편안히 쉬거라.

1000653499.english: Ah, how is the restoration of the True Ancestor kid going?
1000653499.korean: 아, 진조 꼬맹이 복원은 어떻게 되어가?

1000653501.english: Even though Peregrinus says that, he considers him a valuable comrade.
1000653501.korean: 페레그리누스가 말은 저렇게 해도, 소중한 동료라고 생각한단다.

1000653502.english: Precious? What do you mean? Isn't he just a spoiled brat?
1000653502.korean: 소중하긴 무슨. 버릇없는 꼬맹이 아닙니까, 그냥.

1000653503.english: Okay, I'm really going now. See you later.

1000653504.english: - I waved to Peregrinus and Glacias, then stopped in my tracks just as I was about to head back to the information area.
1000653504.korean: - 페레그리누스와 글라시아스에게 손을 흔들어주고 다시 정보 구역으로 향하려다 걸음을 멈췄다.

1000653505.english: - In Orca, there is at least one member who would go crazy for a real True Ancestor Princess.
1000653505.korean: - 오르카에는 실물 진조의 프린세스라면 껌뻑 죽을 대원이… 적어도 한 명은 있다.

1000653506.english: - By now… I wonder if they are preparing for a new expedition?

1000653507.english: - I recalled the igloo I had seen when coming to the ark, which had a sign near the entrance that read 'Arctic Expedition Base Camp'.
1000653507.korean: - 방주로 올 때 보았던, 입구 근처에 ‘북극 탐험대 베이스 캠프’라는 팻말이 세워져 있던 이글루를 떠올렸다.

1000653508.english: Whew. Still, sis, the output seems okay, right?
1000653508.korean: 휘유. 그래도 누님, 출력은 괜찮은 것 같은데?

1000653509.english: That's a relief. If there were any shortcomings, I would try to return to my original self.
1000653509.korean: 다행이구나. 만약 부족함이 있었다면 원래 모습으로 돌아가려 했다.

1000653510.english: Ew, are you serious? Even if my friend didn't notice, my eyes can't be fooled.
1000653510.korean: 엑, 진심이유? 친구는 못 알아챈 것 같아도 내 눈은 못 속이지.

1000653511.english: Sister, you were so happy earlier.

1000653512.english: Because I can't hold you back.

1000653513.english: Oh dear... it's stifling to live only for others like that. You should do what you want and be a bit more like that.
1000653513.korean: 아이고… 그렇게 이타적으로만 사니까 답답한거요. 하고 싶은 것도 하고 좀 그래야지.

1000653514.english: Didn't I tell you? My mission is to fulfill contracts and preserve what humans have left behind.
1000653514.korean: 말했지 않느냐. 계약을 이행하고, 인간이 남긴 것을 지키는 것이 나의 사명.

1000653515.english: I am happy to uphold that mission.
1000653515.korean: 나는 그 사명을 지키는 것이 기쁘단다.

1000653516.english: ...I've wanted to say this for a while, but that mission thing... Isn't it all fake anyway?
1000653516.korean: …전부터 말하고 싶었는데, 그 사명이라는 거. 어차피 다 가짜 아닙니까.

1000653517.english: My older sister asked for my help, and since my thoughts on the matter weren't that different, I didn't oppose the activity itself, but...
1000653517.korean: 누님이 도와달라고 한데다 내 생각이랑 별로 다르지 않아서 활동 자체를 반대하진 않았지만...

1000653518.english: Honestly, getting tied up in such a fake mission doesn't look good.
1000653518.korean: 그런 가짜 사명에 얽매이는 건 솔직히 좋게 보이진 않수.

1000653519.english: ...the day will come when you understand, Peregrinus.

1000653520.english: It's already been almost 100 years, how much longer do we have to wait for such a day to come?
1000653520.korean: 벌써 100년이 되어가는데 뭘 더 얼마나 기다려야 그런 날이 온답니까?

1000653521.english: Didn't you make a friend? A friend who shares similar worries with me.
1000653521.korean: 친구를 사귀었지 않느냐. 나와 비슷한 고민을 품고 있는 친구를.

1000653522.english: The commander, you mean? They didn't seem to be worrying about that much.
1000653522.korean: 사령관말요? 별로 그런 고민하는 것 같지는 않던데.

1000653523.english: Because he always has to be strong.

1000653525.english: Have you seen the feelings his followers have for him?
1000653525.korean: 그를 따르는 이들이 그에게 품는 감정을 보았느냐.

1000653526.english: Well... it was affection, admiration, longing... that kind of thing.

1000653527.english: Okay. Could someone carrying the weight of such emotions, thousands upon thousands of wishes, show weakness?
1000653527.korean: 그래. 그런 감정을, 수천수만의 소망을 어깨에 짊어진 이가 약한 모습을 보일 수 있겠느냐.

1000653529.english: Stay by his side, Peregrinus. There's a role only you can play.
1000653529.korean: 그의 곁을 지켜주거라, 페레그리누스. 너만이 할 수 있는 역할이 있단다.

1000653530.english: Even if my sister and that woman hadn't said anything, I would have done it anyway. Because I liked your friend too.
1000653530.korean: 누님이랑 그 여자의 말이 없었어도 그렇게 했을거요. 나도 친구가 마음에 들었으니까.

1000653531.english: Hoo hoo. Okay, I'll do it.

1000653532.english: Tsk. You're being serious again, even tho it doesn't suit you.
1000653532.korean: 쩝. 또 어울리지도 않게 진지한 이야기를 했구만.

1000653533.english: Let's head back soon. Going to meet the True Ancestor kid... Oh, right.
1000653533.korean: 슬슬 돌아갑시다. 진조 꼬맹이 만나러- 아, 그래.

1000653534.english: Sister, how about we do it like this?

1000653535.english: What kind of prank are you planning this time?

1000653537.english: That, the thing where he tells the True Ancestor kid that his friend is the reincarnation of a Dragon Slayer.
1000653537.korean: 그, 진조 꼬맹이한테 친구가 용살자의 환생이라고 말해주는거요.

1000653540.english: We can't meet the Dragon Slayer anymore, can we? It's not like there are any genetic seeds left, like a True Ancestor kid.
1000653540.korean: 용살자 녀석은 이제 못 만나지 않습니까. 진조 꼬맹이처럼 유전자 씨앗이 남아있는 것도 아니고.

1000653541.english: And wouldn't it be better for the True Ancestor kid than to see them running around like crazy, covering a roughly human-shaped machine frame with rags and trying to revive a dragon slayer?
1000653541.korean: 그리고 대충 사람처럼 생긴 기계 프레임에 거적때기 씌우고 용살자 되살린다고 난리치는 꼴 볼 바엔, 그게 진조 꼬맹이한테도 낫지 않겠수?

1000653543.english: Oh, sister, how long are you going to be stuck in the past?

1000653544.english: If you live like that, you'll just end up as a withered corpse, I'm telling you.
1000653544.korean: 그렇게 살아가면 그냥 말라 비틀어진 시체가 되어버릴 뿐이라니까요.

1000653545.english: Even if your body is fine, your heart can die, your heart.

1000653546.english: It's a good opportunity, isn't it? My friend is truly a dragon slayer, worthy of the title.
1000653546.korean: 마침 좋은 계기도 생겼잖수. 친구는 그야말로 ‘드래곤 슬레이어’의 용살자에 걸맞는 녀석이요.

1000653547.english: Well, their actual personalities are quite different.
1000653547.korean: 뭐, 실제 성격으로 따지면 좀 많이 다르긴 하지만.

1000653548.english: You don't have to get so worked up. I've already sorted out my thoughts too.
1000653548.korean: 그렇게 열 올리지 않아도 괜찮단다. 나도 이미 생각은 정리했으니까.

1000653549.english: So, that's what we're going to do?

1000653551.english: ...Hmph, the reincarnation of a dragon slayer, eh? That's an interesting premise.

1000653552.english: A dragon slayer who overcame death and met again in this world, and the princess of the True Ancestors. Hahaha, that little kid will be thrilled, won't he?
1000653552.korean: 죽음을 극복하고 현세에 다시 만난 용살자와 진조의 프린세스라. 푸하핫, 꼬맹이 그 녀석 환장할걸요?

1000653553.english: Servants, what is it? The fact that you have something to show Us means...
1000653553.korean: 권속이여, 무엇이냐. 짐에게 보여줄 것이 있다는 것은.

1000653554.english: To hide it that much, could it be... Oh!

1000653557.english: - My worry that they would notice in advance was unfounded.

1000653558.english: - After seeing Peregrinus and Glacias, I thought you might have expected this much...
1000653558.korean: - 페레그리누스에 글라시아스까지 봤으니 이정도는 예상할 수도 있을 거라고 생각했는데…

1000653559.english: Servants, what are you muttering about? Quickly guide the luggage to the gift - huh?
1000653559.korean: 권속이여, 무얼 중얼거리고 있느냐. 어서 짐을 선물 앞으로 안내- 어?

1000653560.english: Making me wait for my luggage. You've gotten bolder in the time I haven't seen you, Dragon Slayer.
1000653560.korean: 짐을 기다리게 하다니. 못 본 사이에 간이 커졌구나, 용살자여.

1000653561.english: - I quickly looked around. After exchanging glances with Daphne, who nodded with a determined expression, and then with LRL...
1000653561.korean: - 급히 주위를 둘러보았다. 결연한 표정으로 고개를 끄덕이는 다프네와 눈빛을 교환한 뒤, LRL에게…

1000653564.english: Hmm. Were you going to pick up this little kid? Considering your efforts, I will forgive you for making the luggage wait.
1000653564.korean: 흐음. 이 꼬맹이를 데리러 갔던 것이냐. 그 수고를 봐서 짐을 기다리게 한 것을 용서해 주도록 하마.

1000653565.english: Alright, blue-haired girl. From now on, you shall revere the majesty of me and the Princess of the True Ancestors.
1000653565.korean: 자아, 푸른 머리칼의 소녀여. 앞으로 나와 진조의 프린세스의 위광을 받들거라.

1000653567.english: - I patted LRL, who was on the verge of tears and clutching my clothes tightly.
1000653567.korean: - 울먹이며 내 옷자락을 꼭 쥐는 LRL을 다독여주었다.

1000653569.english: Hmm. As expected, mortals are powerless before the majesty of a True Ancestor.
1000653569.korean: 흠. 역시 범부는 진조의 위광 앞에 맥을 못 추리는군.

1000653570.english: Girl with blue hair, what is your name?

1000653572.english: My, my true name is... Cy, Cyclops Princess... of the great True Ancestors-
1000653572.korean: 지, 짐의 진명은… 사, 사이클롭스 프린세스… 위대한 진조의-

1000653575.english: - Our princess was frightened by the aura emanating from the original Cyclops Princess and hid behind me.
1000653575.korean: - 원조 사이클롭스 프린세스가 뿜어낸 기세에 우리 공주님은 겁을 먹고 내 뒤로 숨어버렸다.

1000653576.english: How dare you falsely claim My name! That sin deserves to be punished a hundred times over!
1000653576.korean: 감히 짐의 이름을 참칭하다니! 그 죄, 백 번 죽어 마땅하도다!

1000653578.english: - I soothed LRL and stood in front of the Cyclops Princess, who looked ready to draw her sword at any moment.
1000653578.korean: - LRL을 달래주고, 당장이라도 검을 뽑을 기세인 사이클롭스 프린세스의 앞을 가로막았다.

1000653579.english: - Okay... when dealing with this kind of member, it was effective to align with their 'worldview' and 'Setting'...
1000653579.korean: - 그래… 이런 대원을 상대할 때는 ‘세계관’과 ‘설정’에 맞춰주는 게 효과적이었지…

1000653581.english: - Okay, did it work?  The Cyclops Princess's momentum had slightly subsided.
1000653581.korean: - 좋아, 먹혔나. 사이클롭스 프린세스의 기세가 살짝 누그러들었다.

1000653582.english: - Holding the sniffling LRL in my arms and stroking it, I carefully opened my mouth.
1000653582.korean: - 훌쩍거리는 LRL을 품에 안고 쓰다듬어주며 조심스럽게 입을 열었다.

1000653583.english: - The story of the War of Destruction, and how LRL was left abandoned in the lighthouse for decades...
1000653583.korean: - 멸망 전쟁이 일어나고, LRL이 수십 년간… 등대에 방치되었던 이야기.

1000653584.english: - The story of how every day, upon waking up in the morning, she would go to sleep alone, holding onto the hope that someone would come to pick her up.
1000653584.korean: - 매일매일, 아침에 일어나면 누군가 자신을 데리러 올 것이라는 희망을 품고 혼자 잠들었던 이야기.

1000653586.english: - The story is that that hope rarely came true.
1000653586.korean: - 그 희망은 좀처럼 이루어지지 않았었다는 이야기.

1000653588.english: - LRL carefully held out a crumpled and tattered 'Dragon Slayer' comic book that she always carried with her.
1000653588.korean: - LRL은 항상 지니고 다니는, 꼬깃꼬깃하고 너덜너덜해진 ‘드래곤 슬레이어’ 만화책을 조심스럽게 내밀었다.

1000653589.english: This, this is my favorite manga... and...
1000653589.korean: 이, 이거… 제가 제일 좋아하는 만화에요… 그, 그리고…

1000653590.english: Everyone else likes them too... but the Cyclops Princess is the best of all.
1000653590.korean: 다른 분들도 다 좋아하는데… 그중에서도 사이클롭스 프린세스가 제일-

1000653593.english: - A cyclops' hand suddenly landed on LRL's head.
1000653593.korean: - LRL의 머리에 사이클롭스의 손이 툭 얹혔다.

1000653594.english: Blue-haired girl, did you see this 'Dragon Slayer' and not give up hope until the very end?
1000653594.korean: 푸른 머리칼의 소녀여, 너는 이 ‘드래곤 슬레이어’를 보고, 끝까지 희망을 놓지 않은 것이냐?

1000653596.english: - As LRL nodded with tears welling up in her eyes, a smile spread across the Cyclops Princess’s lips.
1000653596.korean: - LRL이 눈물이 그렁그렁한 눈으로 고개를 끄덕이자, 사이클롭스 프린세스의 입가에 미소가 피어났다.

1000653597.english: Then! You who have broken free from the shackles and claimed your own fate are worthy to call yourself the Princess of True Ancestor!
1000653597.korean: 그렇다면! 굴레를 벗어나 스스로 운명을 쟁취한 그대에게는 진조의 프린세스를 자칭할 자격이 있도다!

1000653599.english: Now, you usurper who has broken the bonds of fate! Receive the blessing that this Cyclops Princess grants you personally!
1000653599.korean: 자아, 운명의 굴레를 벗어난 찬탈자여! 이 사이클롭스 프린세스가 직접 내리는 은총을 그 몸에 받아들이거라!

1000653601.english: It must have been hard. You endured well, Princess of True Ancestor.

1000653605.english: Wow… this turned into quite an emotional development.

1000653606.english: Hey, kid. Not bad at all.

1000653607.english: Your frivolousness hasn't changed one bit, you foolish idiot.
1000653607.korean: 경박한 것은 조금도 변하지 않았구나, 멍청한 새대가리 같으니.

1000653608.english: Haha, I never thought I'd hear such harsh words and actually like them.
1000653608.korean: 캬, 이 막말이 반갑게 들리는 날이 올 줄이야.

1000653609.english: I'm glad to see you again.

1000653610.english: This energy… could it be, Glacias?!

1000653611.english: What happened? What's with that appearance?!

1000653612.english: Heh heh, I've fulfilled a long-held dream.

1000653613.english: Yes… thanks to my comrade, the Dragon Slayer.

1000653614.english: - As the Cyclops Princess and I exchanged warm greetings upon our reunion, her gaze turned toward me.
1000653614.korean: - 훈훈한 재회의 인사를 나누던 사이클롭스 프린세스의 시선이 나에게 향했다.

1000653615.english: - A large metal finger covered my mouth. Peregrinus, who had dragged me into a corner, whispered.
1000653615.korean: - 커다란 금속 손가락이 내 입을 덮었다. 나를 구석으로 질질 끌고간 페레그리누스가 속삭였다.

1000653616.english: Hey, buddy. I've prepared a little surprise for you. Please get your stories straight.
1000653616.korean: 야, 친구. 내가 사소~한 서프라이즈를 좀 준비했거든. 말 좀 맞춰줘.

1000653617.english: I introduced you to that little kid as the dragon slayer who was reincarnated.
1000653617.korean: 저 꼬맹이한테 네가 환생한 용살자라고 소개했어.

1000653619.english: Okay. From the start, the favorability is already at 100.

1000653620.english: - I received a brief explanation from Peregrinus about the 'Dragon Slayer' android.
1000653620.korean: - 페레그리누스에게 그 ‘용살자’라는 바이오로이드에 대해 간단히 설명을 들었다.

1000653621.english: Yeah. Like us, only one was made specifically for filming and advertising, and their genetic information was also lost.
1000653621.korean: 응. 우리처럼 촬영이랑 광고용으로 딱 한 명만 만들어졌고, 유전 정보도 유실됐어.

1000653622.english: Obtaining the genetic seed of that true ancestor kid was the luck of a lifetime.
1000653622.korean: 저 진조 꼬맹이의 유전자 씨앗을 구한 건 둘도 없을 행운이었지.

1000653625.english: Once you've grieved and mourned enough, you should put it in your memories and move forward.
1000653625.korean: 충분히 슬퍼하고, 애도도 했으면 추억 속에 담아두고 앞으로 나아가야지.

1000653627.english: Well, I say it like that, but of course, it's better if we don't lose anyone.
1000653627.korean: 뭐, 말은 이렇게 하지만 당연히 누구도 잃지 않는 게 좋긴 하지.

1000653628.english: That's what we're fighting for. You too, and me too.
1000653628.korean: 그걸 위해 싸우고 있는 거고. 너도, 나도.

1000653629.english: Then let's go back. The little one is about to start making a fuss - oh dear.
1000653629.korean: 그럼 돌아가자고. 슬슬 꼬맹이가 난리를 칠- 어이쿠.

1000653630.english: Tell Us what you talked about.
1000653630.korean: 무얼 그렇게 속닥거리고 있는 것이냐. 무슨 이야기를 했는지 짐에게 고하거라.

1000653633.english: Hmph. Those who pay tribute to Us shall be given a reward befitting their efforts.
1000653633.korean: 흥. 짐에게 경의를 표하는 자에게는 그에 마땅한 상을 내려야 하는 법.

1000653634.english: That is the authority of the True Ancestor Princess who reigns over all things.
1000653634.korean: 그것이 바로 만물 위에 군림하는 진조의 프린세스의 권위로다.

1000653635.english: I only did what was natural, so you don't need to thank me.
1000653635.korean: 짐은 당연한 일을 한 것뿐이니, 그대가 감사할 필요는 없느니라.

1000653638.english: ...Yes, anything if it's a request from the Dragon Slayer-

1000653639.english: Are you talking about my clothes? That's nothing.

1000653642.english: ... They're playing well together. That's great.

1000653643.english: - It took a little while to get them to understand that I wasn't telling them to strip naked immediately.
1000653643.korean: - 당장 나체가 되라는 뜻이 아니라는 것을 이해시키는 데에는, 조금 시간이 걸렸다.

1000653644.english: So, overcoming death has caused various problems, hasn't it?
1000653644.korean: 역시 죽음을 극복하며 이것저것 문제가 생겼나 보구나.

1000653645.english: The matters We see that pierce through fate are no longer effective against you, the Dragon Slayer. So, from now on, speak clearly.
1000653645.korean: 운명을 꿰뚫어보는 짐의 사안은 지금 용살자 그대에겐 통하지 않는다. 그러니 앞으로는 확실히 말하거라.

1000653646.english: You're a child of noble lineage. Are you feeling okay?

1000653647.english: Other than being in this body again, there are no problems.
1000653647.korean: 다시 이런 몸이 된 것 외에는 문제없느니라.

1000653648.english: Should I say it's all exactly the same...?

1000653649.english: Can you do something about that Setting? Anyway, they're not even the same person as the saint in reality.
1000653649.korean: 그 설정 좀 어떻게 안 돼? 어차피 실제로는 성녀랑 동일인물도 아니면서.

1000653650.english: Shut up, you stupid birdbrain! Won't the world's providence be disrupted?
1000653650.korean: 닥치거라, 멍청한 새대가리! 세계의 섭리가 흐트러지지 않느냐!

1000653652.english: My case is the eye that sees through fate.

1000653653.english: I've known since I opened my eyes in this world that my world is a lie.
1000653653.korean: 짐의 세계가 거짓이라는 것 따위, 현세에서 눈을 떴을 때부터 깨닫고 있었노라.

1000653654.english: - Looking at their behavior, I was sure they were the type who completely immersed themselves in their work, just like Moonbit before...
1000653654.korean: - 행동거지를 보고 분명 이전의 백토처럼 완전히 작품에 몰입한 타입이라고 생각했는데…

1000653655.english: Ha, you're asking for a reason?

1000653656.english: Another person would have been punished, but since it's the Dragon Slayer asking, I'll make an exception and answer.
1000653656.korean: 다른 이였다면 벌을 내렸을 것이나, 용살자의 질문이니 특별히 대답해주도록 하마.

1000653658.english: - Ignoring Peregrinus's complaints with a dismissive wave, the Cyclops princess struck a magnificent pose... specifically, a pose often seen from LRL.
1000653658.korean: - 페레그리누스의 불평을 가볍게 무시한 사이클롭스 프린세스는 멋진 포즈… 구체적으로는 LRL이 자주 선보이던 포즈를 취했다.

1000653663.english: The 'world' where I was born, Midgard! The battles and adventures surrounding the fate of that 'world'!
1000653663.korean: 짐이 태어난 그 ‘세계’, 미드가르드가! 그 ‘세계’의 운명을 둘러싼 싸움과 모험이!

1000653664.english: Because it warms my heart, which flows with noble blood, and soothes my soul! Do you need any other reason beside that?
1000653664.korean: 그것이 짐의, 고귀한 피가 흐르는 심장을 뜨겁게 만들고, 영혼을 달래주기 때문이다! 그것 외에 다른 이유가 필요하느냐!

1000653665.english: - In the sparkling eyes of the Cyclops Princess, I saw a glimpse of LRL.
1000653665.korean: - 눈을 반짝이는 사이클롭스 프린세스에게서 LRL의 모습이 겹쳐 보였다.

1000653666.english: To understand the secrets and principles of the world in an instant. As expected, you are a dragon slayer bound by the threads of fate and destiny.
1000653666.korean: 단숨에 세계의 비밀과 섭리를 이해하다니. 역시 짐과 운명의 실로 엮인 용살자로다.

1000653667.english: You seem like the type who gets tired easily, right?

1000653668.english: - While Peregrinus and I were whispering, the Cyclops Princess stood proudly before Glacias.
1000653668.korean: - 페레그리누스와 귓속말을 나누는 사이, 사이클롭스 프린세스는 글라시아스의 앞에 당당히 섰다.

1000653669.english: Well then, O Frost Dragon of Fulfilled Hopes. Tell me in detail what has happened while I was away from this world.
1000653669.korean: 자아, 소망을 이룬 서리의 드래곤이여. 짐이 이 세계를 떠나있는 동안 무슨 일이 있었는지 낱낱이 고하라.

1000653670.english: They say they've upheld their mission. With Peregrinus.

1000653671.english: - After humanity's extinction, the Cyclops Princess, who had been listening intently to the story of Glacia and Peregrinus fighting Ironworm, Lemonade, with a serious expression, nodded.
1000653671.korean: - 인류가 멸망한 뒤, 글라시아스와 페레그리누스가 철충, 레모네이드와 싸워온 이야기를 심각한 얼굴로 듣고 있던 사이클롭스 프린세스가 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000653672.english: Has humanity perished...? I offer my condolences, Dragon of Frost.
1000653672.korean: 인간이 멸망했는가… 유감을 표한다, 서리의 드래곤이여.

1000653673.english: It's okay. I still have something... to protect.
1000653673.korean: 괜찮단다. 나에겐 아직… 지킬 것이 남아있으니.

1000653674.english: Dragon Slayer, is it? Hmm, as expected, the oath of protection continues even beyond space and time.
1000653674.korean: 용살자인가. 흠, 역시 시공을 넘어서도 수호의 맹약은 지속되고 있군.

1000653675.english: We are a usurper of fate, yet We do not deny fate. It is also fate that we have met again, transcending time and space.
1000653675.korean: 짐은 운명의 찬탈자이나, 운명을 부정하지는 않지. 시공을 뛰어넘어 다시 그대들과 만난 것 또한 운명.

1000653676.english: Once again, I accept the Dragon Slayer as my kin and vow to share their fate.
1000653676.korean: 다시 한 번 용살자를 권속으로 받아들이고, 운명을 함께하겠노라.

1000653677.english: - The Cyclops Princess looked at me and held out the back of her hand. I knelt down on one knee, being mindful, and kissed the gauntlet.
1000653677.korean: - 사이클롭스 프린세스는 날 보며 손등을 내밀었다. 눈치껏 한쪽 무릎을 꿇고 건틀릿에 입을 맞췄다.

1000653678.english: Huhu, the covenant has been reestablished here. Do you have something to ask?
1000653678.korean: 후후후, 맹약은 이곳에 다시 성립했다. 무언가 청할 것이라도 있느냐?

1000653679.english: - Although there are no immediate combat missions, a simple task has come to mind.
1000653679.korean: - 당장 전투 임무는 없지만, 간단한 일이 떠올랐다.

1000653680.english: - When I went to LRL earlier, I heard that the Arctic expedition team had a vacancy because Alvis was taken away.
1000653680.korean: - 아까 LRL을 찾아갔을 때, 북극 탐험대는 알비스가 끌려가는 바람에 결원이 생겼다고 들었다.

1000653681.english: Exploration, you say... will the Dragon Slayer be joining as well?

1000653683.english: However, there's no problem. The noble True Ancestor Princess herself has deigned to show her followers a treasure trove of ten thousand gold pieces!
1000653683.korean: 허나 문제없다. 고귀한 진조의 프린세스가 친히, 짐을 따르는 자들에게 만금의 재보를 보여주겠노라!

1000653684.english: Phew. Thanks for playing along, buddy.

1000653685.english: What are you getting caught doing?

1000653686.english: Hmm, I hadn't thought about that.

1000653688.english: In the kid's mind, you're already a dragon slayer, so even if there's something a little suspicious, they'll unconsciously fit it in and convince themselves.
1000653688.korean: 꼬맹이 머릿속에서 이미 너는 용살자니까, 조금 미심쩍은 부분이 있어도 무의식적으로 끼워 맞추고 혼자 납득하게 될 거야.

1000653689.english: It seems you've already figured it out.
1000653689.korean: 내가 보기엔 이미 눈치채고 있는 것 같구나.

1000653691.english: The princess is immersed in the world of 'Dragon Slayer,' but that doesn't mean she's closing her eyes and ears.
1000653691.korean: 공주는 ‘드래곤 슬레이어’의 세계관에 빠져있지만, 그렇다고 눈과 귀를 막고 있는 것은 아니란다.

1000653692.english: You should know by now that Midgard, magic, and reincarnation don't exist.
1000653692.korean: 미드가르드도, 마법도, 환생도 존재하지 않는다는 것 정도는 잘 알고 있을 테지.

1000653693.english: The princess simply understood the role expected of her at the time and embraced it in her own way.
1000653693.korean: 공주는 그저, 지금 자기에게 요구되는 역할을 파악하고 자신만의 방식으로 받아들였을 뿐이다.

1000653694.english: ...Is this why you allowed me to joke around?

1000653696.english: Don't worry. The princess's pride as the True Ancestor's princess is genuine.
1000653696.korean: 걱정하지 말거라. 공주가 진조의 프린세스로서 갖고 있는 긍지는 진짜란다.

1000653697.english: If such a princess has recognized you as a dragon slayer, then you are indeed a person worthy of being a true dragon slayer.
1000653697.korean: 그런 공주가 그대를 용살자로 인정했다면, 그대가 진짜 용살자에 걸맞는 인물이라는 것.

1000653698.english: I told you not to worry. Given their personality, if they didn't like it, they would have caused a fuss the moment they saw it.
1000653698.korean: 걱정 말라니까. 쟤 성격상 마음에 안 들었으면 보자마자 난리쳤을 거야.

1000653699.english: Haha, that must have been fun in its own way.
1000653699.korean: 푸하핫, 그건 또 그거 나름대로 재밌었겠지.

1000653700.english: I'd rather... Oh, it's the manager girl.
1000653700.korean: 난 차라리 그쪽이 더… 오, 관리자 아가씨잖아.

1000653701.english: Negative. This entity is not currently the administrator of the Ark.
1000653701.korean: 부정. 본 개체는 현재 방주의 관리자가 아닙니다.

1000653702.english: Oh, right. Did my friend say they got authorized?

1000653703.english: The restoration work in the ecological conservation area has been completed.
1000653703.korean: 생태 보존 구역의 복구 작업이 완료되었습니다.

1000653704.english: It seems like the attacks have been happening too frequently lately...
1000653704.korean: 요새 습격이 너무 잦은 것 같은데…

1000653710.english: I don't know. Ask Armand about unit reorganization or combat missions.
1000653710.korean: 난 몰라. 부대 재편이나 전투 임무는 아르망한테 물어봐.

1000653713.english: They say it's almost done. The genetic seed was in really good condition.
1000653713.korean: 거의 끝나간대. 유전자 씨앗 보존 상태가 되게 좋다더라고.

1000653718.english: Maybe it's too big of a deal, so you're subconsciously rejecting it...?
1000653718.korean: 아니, 너무 큰 거라 무의식적으로 거부하는건가…?

1000653721.english: Well… in short, they're your fan.

1000653724.english: I didn't think it would turn out like this… but it's fine, it's fine.
1000653724.korean: 이렇게 나올 줄은 몰랐는데… 괜찮아, 괜찮아.

1000653725.english: Princess, please listen for a moment.

1000653727.english: This is what supported LRL back then. LRL, can you show it for a moment?
1000653727.korean: 그때 LRL에게 버팀목이 되어줬던 게 이거야. LRL, 잠깐 보여줄래?

1000653728.english: Dragon Slayer? What are you talking—mmph.

1000653732.english: Is there no way to bring them back?

1000653733.english: …Don't you want to see them again?

1000653736.english: I was just asking for advice on how to thank you for comforting LRL.
1000653736.korean: LRL을 위로해준걸 어떻게 감사해야될지 상담하고 있었어.

1000653737.english: She seems cheerful on the outside, but our princess carries a lot of wounds.
1000653737.korean: 겉으로는 활발해 보이지만 상처가 많으니까, 우리 공주님.

1000653739.english: But… can I ask just one more favor?

1000653740.english: Could I borrow your outfit, Princess?
1000653740.korean: 공주님의 의상을 좀 빌릴 수 있을까?

1000653743.english: Uh… then, do you know that you're an actor?
1000653743.korean: 어… 그럼 넌 네가 배우인 걸 아는 거야?

1000653749.english: It's okay, I'm used to it.

1000653751.english: Please take care of LRL. For a while, could you… yeah, go exploring in my place?
1000653751.korean: LRL을 부탁해. 당분간 가이… 그래, 탐험을 해주면 안될까?

1000653752.english: No, it'd be a bit difficult for me.

1000653753.english: But… what if I get found out?

1000653754.english: That I'm not the Dragon Slayer.

1000653758.english: …Then what am I supposed to do?

1000653759.english: Well, that'd be a relief, but…

1000653760.english: Right, if that's the case—wait, no, then…

1000653762.english: Yeah, I'm the administrator guy. Mnemosyne, what's up?
1000653762.korean: 그래, 내가 관리자 아저씨다. 므네모시네, 무슨일이야?

1000653765.english: Ugh~ We haven't had any results in days.

1000653766.english: At this point, it might be faster to look for places we haven't been to yet, Empress?
1000653766.korean: 이만큼 돌아다녔으면 안 가본 데를 찾는 게 더 빠를 것 같은데, 엠프리스 대원?

1000653768.english: Well, I agree with you on that. Should we go a bit farther out?
1000653768.korean: 뭐, 그 의견엔 나도 동의해. 좀 멀리 나가볼까?

1000653769.english: ...No! What if we've been missing something important all along, Empress?!
1000653769.korean: ...아니! 어쩌면 우린 중요한 걸 놓치고 있는 걸지도 몰라, 엠프리스 대원!

1000653770.english: Like what? And stop trying to steal the leader role all the time.
1000653770.korean: 뭐가? 그리고 시도 때도 없이 대장자리 노리는 거 그만해.

1000653771.english: The last discovery wasn't made by just the two of us, remember?
1000653771.korean: 저번 성과는 우리 둘이서만 이뤄낸 게 아니잖아.

1000653772.english: Let's go on an adventure again with LRL and Alvis! I'm sure we'll find something amazing again!
1000653772.korean: 다시 LRL 대원과 알비스 대원이랑 모험하자! 분명 또 엄청난 걸 발견할 수 있을 거야!

1000653773.english: The two of them can't go exploring for a while.

1000653774.english: Alvis is the magical archer guarding the gate... So, Andvari dragged her away, and LRL was with the Cyclops Princess...
1000653774.korean: 알비스는 관문을 지키는 마탄의 사수... 그러니까 안드바리한테 끌려갔고, LRL은 사이클롭스 프린세스랑...

1000653776.english: Did you hear? I have information that the Cyclops Princess's treasure is located not far from here!
1000653776.korean: 들었느냐? 이곳과 머지않은 곳에 사이클롭스 프린세스의 재보가 있다는 정보를!

1000653777.english: What, you already met them? No, more than that...
1000653777.korean: 뭐야, 벌써 만나고 왔어? 아니, 그것보다...

1000653780.english: That's right! It's one of the ancient secrets We learned from the Cyclops Princess.
1000653780.korean: 그렇다! 짐이 사이클롭스 프린세스에게 들은 고대의 비밀 중 하나이지.

1000653781.english: Normally, it should have been revealed through Our Akashic Records, but...
1000653781.korean: 본래 같았다면 짐의 아카식 레코드로 밝혀냈어야 하지만...

1000653782.english: Because the powers of another Cyclops princess, who shared the same fate, and the powers of the burden clashed... Even We couldn't figure it out...!
1000653782.korean: 같은 운명을 지닌, 또다른 사이클롭스 프린세스의 권능과 짐의 권능이 충돌했기에... 짐조차 알아내지 못했던 것이다...!

1000653783.english: What will you do? Are you ready to cross the Bifrost one more time and bring back Asgard's treasures?
1000653783.korean: 어떻게 하겠느냐. 한 번 더 무지개 다리를 건너 아스가르드의 보물을 가져올 준비가 되었느냐!

1000653785.english: LRL team member! Thank you for bringing valuable information.
1000653785.korean: LRL 대원! 귀중한 정보를 가져오느라 수고했어.

1000653786.english: Hmph, it is only right that I should accomplish this task. You're being too complimentary.
1000653786.korean: 후후, 마땅히 짐이 이뤄야 할 과업이거늘. 칭찬이 과하구나.

1000653787.english: Where's the treasure vault? Is it really there?
1000653787.korean: 보물 창고는 어디에 있대? 진짜 있는 거 맞아?

1000653790.english: To question the authenticity of information from Us, the observer of all things...
1000653790.korean: 만물의 관찰자인 짐의 정보에 진위여부를 따지다니.

1000653791.english: Normally, you should be severely punished, but I'll let it slide this time.
1000653791.korean: 본래 같아선 엄격히 처벌해야 하나, 이번 한번은 넘어가주도록 하마.

1000653792.english: Next time, I will punish the crime severely.

1000653793.english: You're dressed similarly to LRL. Is that the Cyclops Princess?
1000653793.korean: LRL이랑 옷차림이 비슷하네. 쟤가 사이클롭스 프린세스야?

1000653796.english: No, that is not so! We are...

1000653797.english: You are of the True Ancestor clan, recognized by Us.

1000653798.english: Girl with blue hair, who shares the same fate as Us, lift your head.
1000653798.korean: 짐과 같은 운명을 공유하는 푸른 머리칼의 소녀여, 고개를 들거라.

1000653800.english: Me, me, I'll just stay behind the Empress for a bit!
1000653800.korean: 나, 나 잠깐만 엠프리스 뒤에 있을래!

1000653801.english: It's rare to see an LRL member being shy.
1000653801.korean: LRL 대원이 수줍어하는 건 또 보기 드문데말야.

1000653802.english: Yeah, you're right. You were recognized as the princess of the True Ancestors, weren't you? Why are you so shy?
1000653802.korean: 그러게. 진조의 프린세스라고 인정받았잖아. 왜 부끄러워하고 그래.

1000653804.english: Anyway, it's nice to meet you. So you're the Cyclops Princess.
1000653804.korean: 어쨌든 만나서 반가워. 네가 사이클롭스 프린세스구나.

1000653805.english: ... How dare you offer me a handshake first? You value your life, don't you?
1000653805.korean: ...감히 짐에게 먼저 악수를 청하다니. 목숨이 아까운 줄-

1000653806.english: Cyclops Princess! I heard from LRL that there's a treasure vault nearby, is that right?
1000653806.korean: 사이클롭스 프린세스! LRL한테 들었어, 근처에 보물 창고가 있다며?

1000653807.english: Please tell us where it is. No, let's go together!
1000653807.korean: 우리한테 어딨는지 좀 알려주라. 아니, 같이 가자!

1000653808.english: It's sure to be a heart-pounding adventure! How is it?
1000653808.korean: 분명 가슴이 두근대는 모험이 될 거야! 어때?

1000653809.english: Wait a moment, Triaena crew! It's my job as the leader to recommend it!
1000653809.korean: 잠깐만, 트리아이나 대원! 권유하는 건 대장인 내 역할이라구!

1000653810.english: Are you just going to take the cool parts without asking?

1000653811.english: As the adventure continues, the expedition team is bound to change as well.

1000653812.english: I, the leader of the Triaina Exploration Team, hereby declare the birth of the "New Arctic Exploration Team" right here and now!
1000653812.korean: 나, 트리아이나 탐험 대장은 지금 여기서 "뉴 북극 탐험대"가 태어난 것을 선언한다!

1000653813.english: What's that! Where did my Arctic expedition team go?
1000653813.korean: 뭐야, 그게! 내 북극 탐험대는 어디 갔는데!

1000653814.english: It disappeared into the back alleys of history. Let go now.
1000653814.korean: 역사 속 뒤안길로 사라졌지. 이제 그만 놓아주라구.

1000653815.english: I haven't heard anything like that! It was fine until this morning!
1000653815.korean: 그런 얘기 못 들었어! 오늘 아침까진 멀쩡했단 말이야!

1000653817.english: Alright, I will lead you to a treasure trove worth a fortune.
1000653817.korean: 좋다, 짐이 그대들을 만금의 재보 앞으로 데려가주마.

1000653818.english: Now, Princess of the True Ancestors. With those eyes that hold dark magic, clearly behold what kind of being I am!
1000653818.korean: 자아, 진조의 프린세스여. 어두운 마력을 품은 그 눈으로, 짐이 어떤 존재인지 똑똑히 목도하거라!

1000653820.english: Look at LRL's face, it's all red. It looks like it'll explode if you touch it.
1000653820.korean: LRL 얼굴 빨개진 거 봐. 손대면 펑 터지겠는데.

1000653821.english: Alright! Now that we have a goal and our colleagues have gathered.

1000653822.english: Let's head toward the Cyclops Princess's treasure vault!
1000653822.korean: 사이클롭스 프린세스의 보물 창고를 향해, 출발이야!

1000653825.english: I've had a good feeling since coming in... I think this expedition is going to yield a huge haul!
1000653825.korean: 들어올 때부터 좋은 느낌인데... 이번 탐험도 엄청난 수확을 거둘 것 같아!

1000653826.english: It took some time to break down the security door... but there must be treasure, right?
1000653826.korean: 보안문을 부수느라 시간이 걸렸지만... 보물은 확실히 있겠지?

1000653827.english: Cyclops Princess! Is this the right place?

1000653828.english: ...You are a suspicious penguin. How dare you try to insult me?
1000653828.korean: ...의심이 많은 펭귄이로구나. 감히 짐을 능멸하려 드느냐?

1000653829.english: No... you didn't know the password when you came in here.
1000653829.korean: 아니... 여기 들어올 때 비밀번호, 너 몰랐잖아.

1000653831.english: Hahaha... My memory was just temporarily blurred while I was overcoming death.
1000653831.korean: 후.후.후... 죽음을 극복하는 동안 잠시 기억이 흐려졌을뿐.

1000653832.english: The power of the True Ancestor remains intact!

1000653834.english: Huh? Member Empress! Look at that!

1000653835.english: Why? And it's not a squad member.

1000653836.english: Look, there's a mountain of gold bars piled up in the corner over there! Plus some chocolate cookies!
1000653836.korean: 봐봐, 저기 구석에 금괴가 산더미처럼 쌓여있잖아! 덤으로 초코 과자도!

1000653838.english: Faith is indeed the most beautiful value. There is no salvation for those who do not know it.
1000653838.korean: 믿음이야말로 가장 아름다운 가치. 그것을 알지 못하는 자들에게 구원은 없도다.

1000653839.english: Isn't that so, my girl who shares the same destiny?

1000653842.english: Hmph. It is still too early to accept the true majesty of the True Ancestor.
1000653842.korean: 훗. 아직 진조의 진정한 위광을 받아들이기엔 이른게지.

1000653843.english: I understand. Behold, I will bestow upon you this black and sweet fruit of sin.
1000653843.korean: 짐은 이해하노라. 자, 이 검고 달콤한 죄악의 열매를 하사하겠다.

1000653846.english: It's different from the time of Glacias.

1000653847.english: I've never seen LRL act so hesitant before. She must be really nervous.
1000653847.korean: LRL이 저렇게 쭈뼛거리는 거 처음 봐. 많이 긴장했는걸.

1000653848.english: Ah, it is a rare scene, though.

1000653849.english: Well, since we're fellow explorers! Won't we get close quickly?
1000653849.korean: 뭐, 탐험대 동료니까! 금방 친해지지 않겠어?

1000653850.english: Huh...? Wait a minute, Triaina, look at this.

1000653852.english: No, wait! Let me guess. You discovered a massive treasure! What is it, what is it?
1000653852.korean: 아니, 잠시만! 내가 맞춰볼게. 엄청난 보물을 발견한 거지! 뭔데, 뭔데?

1000653853.english: didn't know because it was buried in gold bars and chocolate snacks, but this...
1000653853.korean: 금괴랑 초코 과자에 파묻혀있어서 몰랐는데, 이거...

1000653854.english: Like a barrier device... Huh? It's coming down!

1000653858.english: Hmm. As a supreme delicacy- No...?!

1000653860.english: Why is the wall... Is everyone okay?! You're all safe, right!
1000653860.korean: 왜 벽이... 다들 괜찮아?! 무사한 거지!

1000653866.english: The Empress and I are safe! Where are the other two?

1000653868.english: And just now, one of Our faded memories came to mind.
1000653868.korean: 그리고 방금, 짐의 흐려졌던 기억 중 하나가 떠올랐노라.

1000653869.english: In this treasure... there are countless traps like this wall.
1000653869.korean: 이 재보엔... 이 벽과 같은 함정이 무수히 존재하지.

1000653871.english: So that intruders cannot enter carelessly...!

1000653872.english: Hey! Then you should have told me in advance! Why didn't you tell me!
1000653872.korean: 야! 그러면 미리 말해줘야지, 왜 말 안 해줬어!

1000653873.english: ...as I said, the curse of the fog descended upon Our memory-

1000653874.english: Ah, seriously! Enough, back off. I'll just use the Ice Age Blaster...
1000653874.korean: 아, 진짜! 됐으니까 물러나. 그냥 아이스 에이지 블래스터로...

1000653876.english: Empress, shh. I have a good idea.

1000653878.english: How about we go on adventures separately in pairs like this?
1000653878.korean: 이대로 둘씩 따로 모험하는 건 어때?

1000653880.english: So that LRL and Cyclops Princess can become friends?
1000653880.korean: LRL이랑 사이클롭스 프린세스가 친해질 수 있게?

1000653882.english: ...That's a good idea. Let's do that.

1000653883.english: It can't be helped. Since things have turned out this way, let's split into pairs and move forward.
1000653883.korean: 어쩔 수 없네. 이렇게 된 이상 둘씩 나눠서 움직이자.

1000653884.english: We meet at the deepest part. Got it?

1000653886.english: Cyclops Princess, just the two of them...?

1000653887.english: Haha, the journey with the dragon slayer was also a series of unexpected events.
1000653887.korean: 후후, 용살자와의 여정도 예기치 못한 일들의 연속이었지.

1000653888.english: Did you happen to see that story as well?

1000653890.english: Scattered apart and then meeting again...

1000653892.english: O girl of blue hair! Can you overcome this trial of fate and accept the true majesty of the True Ancestor!
1000653892.korean: 푸른 머리칼의 소녀여. 이 운명의 시련을 이겨내고, 진정한 진조의 위광을 받아들일 수 있겠느냐!

1000653893.english: Ah... yes! I, I won't disturb you...
1000653893.korean: 아... 네! 저, 저는 방해되지 않게...

1000653896.english: We are asking to borrow your strength.
1000653896.korean: 짐은, 그대의 힘을 빌려달라고 말하고 있는 것이다.

1000653898.english: That is so. Even though We are the Princess of the True Ancestors, it has not been long since We overcame death.
1000653898.korean: 그러하다. 아무리 짐이 진조의 프린세스라고 해도, 죽음을 극복한지 얼마 되지 않았지.

1000653899.english: We desperately need your help, as you share the same fate.
1000653899.korean: 짐은 같은 운명을 지닌 그대의 도움이 절실하게 필요하노라.

1000653900.english: The Cyclops Princess to me... Hehe, yes!

1000653902.english: Hehe. You're getting used to it. Don't rush.
1000653902.korean: 후후. 점점 익숙해져가고 있구나. 서두르지 말거라.

1000653904.english: Huh...? But that AGS is... a familiar too...?

1000653907.english: Ah...! You were guarding the treasure, right?
1000653907.korean: 아...! 재보를 지키고 있었던 거죠, 그렇죠?

1000653908.english: ...Th-that's right. You are still carrying out my orders even now.
1000653908.korean: ...그, 그렇지. 지금까지도 짐의 명령을 수행하고 있구나.

1000653914.english: ...Before the ages, even the noble guardians have fallen.

1000653915.english: I command you, manifest in the form of crimson blood!

1000653916.english: Demonic Sword: O Covenant of Darkness...!

1000653917.english: Triaina! Look over here, it's a huge chocolate statue!
1000653917.korean: 트리아이나! 여기 좀 봐, 엄청 큰 초콜릿 동상이야!

1000653919.english: Empress crew member, look over here too!

1000653920.english: It's chocolate with real herring in it! Doesn't it look delicious?

1000653921.english: I told you it's not a penguin! I cook herring before I eat it too!
1000653921.korean: 펭귄 아니라니까! 나도 청어는 익혀서 먹어!

1000653922.english: ... Anyway, it's embarrassing how worried I was. There's nothing particularly dangerous.
1000653922.korean: ...그나저나 걱정한 게 무안할 정도네. 별 위험한 것도 없고.

1000653923.english: Yeah, you're right. We'd become friends quickly if we went through some hardship together.
1000653923.korean: 그러게. 같이 고생을 해야 금방 친해질텐데.

1000653924.english: Well, there's nothing I can do about it. There will be plenty of opportunities in the future anyway.
1000653924.korean: 뭐, 어쩔 수 없지. 어차피 앞으로 기회는 많을테니까.

1000653926.english: Ugh, ugh... Aaaah...! There's too much...!

1000653927.english: Um... Are you okay...? Me too...

1000653928.english: Hmph. Even tho you asked for help, it is my duty to deal with the betraying kin.
1000653928.korean: 흥. 아무리 도움을 청했다 하나, 배신한 권속을 처리하는 것은 짐의 일.

1000653929.english: You can leisurely watch the fate of the fallen kin.
1000653929.korean: 그대는 영락한 권속의 말로가 어떤지 느긋하게 구경하고 있거라.

1000653931.english: Oh! This is a limited-edition truffle chocolate, one of only a few in the world!
1000653931.korean: 오옷! 이건 전 세계에 몇 없는 한정판 트러플 초콜릿이잖아!

1000653932.english: It's a treasure in the world of chocolate! I'll have to take everything I can!

1000653933.english: Every time I pass a room, I discover something new. This is what exploration is all about!
1000653933.korean: 방 하나를 지날 때마다 새로운 걸 발견하네. 이게 탐험이지!

1000653934.english: But I'm worried about the AGS expenses we processed earlier. I wonder if there's one over there too?
1000653934.korean: 근데 아까 처리한 경비 AGS가 맘에 걸려. 저쪽에도 있으려나?

1000653935.english: It's just a regular model, so there shouldn't be any problems, right? And I heard the True Ancestor Princess is an amazing fighter.
1000653935.korean: 그냥 평범한 모델이라 문제없을걸? 그리고 진조 공주님 엄청 잘 싸운다고 들었어.

1000653938.english: Heeing...! Why are there more and more of them? It never ends...
1000653938.korean: 히잉...! 왜 더 많아지는 거야, 끝이 안 보여...

1000653939.english: Overcome the curse of fear. I am with you!
1000653939.korean: 두려움이라는 저주를 이겨내거라. 짐이 곁에 있노라!

1000653942.english: Alright, let's plan for the future here.

1000653944.english: I will descend to the deepest depths of the treasure.

1000653945.english: This magic tool... Using the elevator!

1000653947.english: You, you even thought of things like this...?

1000653948.english: Hmph, I told you there was nothing to worry about.
1000653948.korean: 후후, 아무것도 걱정할 필요 없다고 말했을텐데.

1000653950.english: Alright, hold onto your luggage tightly. The deeper you go, the stronger the spiritual energy underground will become...!
1000653950.korean: 자아, 짐을 꼭 붙잡거라. 아래로 갈수록, 지하의 영기가 진해질테니...!

1000653956.english: You're too fast... The same place?!

1000653959.english: Hmm... Aren't we almost on the top floor now? I've come down quite a bit, but I still haven't met them.
1000653959.korean: 흠... 지금 거의 마지막 층 아냐? 꽤 깊이 내려왔는데 아직도 못 만났네.

1000653960.english: I hope nothing bad has really happened...?
1000653960.korean: 진짜 무슨 일 생긴 건 아니겠지...?

1000653962.english: ... I want to say that, but I'm starting to get a little uneasy. Anything can happen on an adventure, after all.
1000653962.korean: ...라고 하고 싶은데, 슬슬 불안해지는걸. 탐험엔 어떤 일이 일어나도 이상하지 않으니까.

1000653969.english: Huh...? Your, your Highness... My legs are shaking...
1000653969.korean: 에...? 고, 공주님... 다리가, 떨리고 있는데...

1000653970.english: ... I never thought feedback that overcame death would finally arrive.

1000653972.english: ...... It's okay. You... I still have enough strength to guide the hope of the future.
1000653972.korean: ......괜찮다. 그대를... 미래의 희망을 인도할 기력 정도는, 남아 있느니라.

1000653974.english: Hoo hoo. But... Now you can speak quite comfortably, can't you?
1000653974.korean: 후후. 그런데... 이제 제법 편하게 말하게 되었지 않느냐.

1000653976.english: Um, that... Just because the commander and her retinue called it that...
1000653976.korean: 그, 그게... 사령, 권속이 그렇게 불렀다고 해서...

1000653977.english: It's okay. For Us, worldly titles mean nothing. As long as it's filled with meaning and respect!
1000653977.korean: 괜찮다. 짐에게 속세의 호칭따위, 아무런 의미가 없지. 그 안에 의미와 존경심만 담겨 있다면!

1000653981.english: Girl who inherited the blood of the True Ancestors... Come closer...
1000653981.korean: 진조의 피를 이은 소녀여... 이리 가까이 와보거라...

1000653983.english: Listen carefully. Going underground means you're getting closer to the underworld.
1000653983.korean: 잘 듣거라. 지하로 내려간다는 건 곧, 명계와 가까워짐을 뜻한다.

1000653984.english: And that, the spirit of the underworld that embraces death... The feedback is eating away at Our body.
1000653984.korean: 그리고 그, 죽음을 품은 지하의 영기가... 피드백을 받은 짐의 옥체를 좀먹고 있다.

1000653985.english: Oh, then that's a big problem... Isn't something serious happening...?
1000653985.korean: 그, 그럼 큰일... 큰 일난 거 아니에요...?

1000653986.english: Hmph, this is only a temporary phenomenon. No matter how powerful the aura of death may be, it cannot surpass the true ancestor's power of immortality.
1000653986.korean: 후후, 이것은 일시적인 현상이니라. 아무리 죽음의 영기가 강력하다고 한들, 진조의 불사의 권능을 넘볼 수는 없지.

1000653987.english: However... Until we get out of here, We will continue to weaken.
1000653987.korean: 다만... 이곳을 빠져나가기 전까진, 짐은 계속 약해질 것이다.

1000653989.english: As I said, I need help.

1000653990.english: The help of a noble True Ancestor princess who has awakened her true power.
1000653990.korean: 자신의 진정한 힘을 각성한, 고귀한 진조의 프린세스의 도움이.

1000653992.english: Girl who holds hope and dreams, what is your true name!
1000653992.korean: 희망을 품고 꿈꾸는 소녀여, 그대의 진명이 무엇이더냐!

1000653995.english: ... The usurper of fate and the observer of all things.

1000653996.english: The Cyclops Princess, wielding the power bestowed by the "World"!

1000653997.english: Hoo hoo hoo... Feel it. The noble blood flowing through your heart!
1000653997.korean: 후후후... 느껴보거라. 그대의 심장을 흐르는, 고귀한 피를!

1000653998.english: ... I can feel it. Something I hadn't realized until now... Powerful magic...!

1000653999.english: ... Okay. With this, you have become a true member of Our clan.
1000653999.korean: ...좋다. 그대는 이것으로, 진정한 짐의 혈족이 되었다.

1000654001.english: The princess of the True Ancestors wouldn't be crying, would she?

1000654002.english: Hmph, hmph. It was only for a moment that my body lost control due to the awakening of power!
1000654002.korean: 흐, 흥. 힘의 각성 때문에 잠시 신체가 통제를 벗어났을뿐이니라!

1000654003.english: Then, let's move on. Toward the true ancestral treasure hidden deep within this treasure trove!
1000654003.korean: 그렇다면, 나아가도록 하자. 이 재보 깊숙한 곳에 숨겨진, 진조의 비보를 향해!

1000654004.english: Whew. Whew. Whew! I'll be happy to join you anytime.

1000654005.english: Huh? The True Ancestor's secret treasure?

1000654009.english: LRL member, Cyclops Princess! Are you safe?
1000654009.korean: LRL 대원, 사이클롭스 프린세스 대원! 무사해?

1000654010.english: I can't hear your voice well because it's far away.

1000654011.english: Still, it's a relief that everything looks fine. If I go a little further, soon... huh?
1000654011.korean: 그래도 별일 없어 보여서 다행이다. 좀 더 가면 곧... 어?

1000654014.english: Since you were separated from the luggage, the magic power probably didn't continue well.
1000654014.korean: 짐과 떨어져서 마력이 잘 이어지지 않았을테지.

1000654015.english: Still, it is a relief to see that she looks safe.

1000654016.english: ...Huh? What are you shouting... and you're... looking... behind...?

1000654019.english: I acknowledge your service in protecting the treasures, but my patience has now reached its limit.
1000654019.korean: 그간 재보를 수호한 공은 인정하나, 짐의 인내심도 이제 한계.

1000654021.english: There are far more of them than before; can you handle it?
1000654021.korean: 아까보다 수가 훨씬 더 많은데, 감당할 수 있겠느냐?

1000654022.english: Ha. Even though you claim to have awakened your power, there is nothing a snot-nosed kid can't say.
