1000654022.korean: 하. 힘을 각성했다고는 하나, 코흘리개가 못 하는 말이 없구나.

1000654023.english: ...However, arrogance is also a quality of a True Ancestor Princess. I shall see if you possess the skills to match that arrogance...!
1000654023.korean: ...허나, 오만한 것 또한 진조의 프린세스의 자질. 그 오만함에 걸맞는 실력을 갖고 있는지 확인해보겠노라...!

1000654024.english: Darkness in the sky, flames on the earth.

1000654025.english: Hahaha! I'll show you. The power of a true True Ancestor Princess...!
1000654025.korean: 후.후.후! 보여주마. 진정한 진조의 프린세스의 힘을...!

1000654026.english: "O master of darkness, O name of destruction!"

1000654027.english: "The builder of destiny, the Cyclops Princess commands."
1000654027.korean: 『 운명을 구축하는 자, 사이클롭스 프린세스가 명한다. 』

1000654029.english: "Chaos here, I break the seal of destruction and annihilation!"
1000654029.korean: 『『 혼돈을 이곳에, 파멸의 멸절의 봉인을 푸노라! 』』

1000654032.korean: 『 사이클롭스   빔    ㅡ ! 』&n『   진조의     섬광  ㅡ !   』

1000654033.english: Triaina, you were right. That guy is really strong.
1000654033.korean: 트리아이나, 네가 한 말이 맞았어. 쟤 진짜 세네.

1000654034.english: We could have done without us, couldn't we?

1000654035.english: I thought she'd be strong just because she's Dragon's comrade!
1000654035.korean: 용이랑 동료라고 해서 강할 줄 알았지!

1000654036.english: ... Well, I didn't know it would go this far.

1000654038.english: Heh heh heh, my kin. Have you come to fulfill the Guardian's Oath?
1000654038.korean: 큭큭큭, 권속들이여. 수호의 맹약을 완수하러 왔더냐.

1000654039.english: However, nothing in this world can stand against Us and the Cyclops Princess, who have awakened their true power!
1000654039.korean: 허나, 진정한 힘을 각성한 짐과 사이클롭스 프린세스에게 대적할 수 있는 것은 이 세상에 존재하지 않느니라!

1000654041.english: If I had known it would be like this, I should have come a little slower.
1000654041.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 조금만 더 천천히 올 걸 그랬네.

1000654042.english: You've already taken so much treasure that you can't carry it all anyway. It would have been better to meet beforehand... Huh?
1000654042.korean: 어차피 다 못 가져갈 정도로 보물 챙겼잖아. 미리 만나는 게 나았... 응?

1000654045.english: I think I was dozing off, are you okay?

1000654046.english: Heh heh... We are of a great bloodline, therefore...

1000654048.english: Since I used the clan's vision, I'll soon be overcome with sleepiness.
1000654048.korean: 일족의 비전을 사용했으니 곧 잠기운이 쏟아질 것이다.

1000654049.english: When I wake up, I'll be even stronger than I am now. Go ahead and close your eyes and rest.
1000654049.korean: 자고 일어나면 지금보다 더 강해져있을 터. 마음 놓고 눈을 붙이거라.

1000654050.english: But... I still haven't heard the news about the Cyclops Princess... I couldn't find it...
1000654050.korean: 하지만... 사이클롭스 프린세스의 비보를 아직... 못, 찾았는데...

1000654051.english: I have to find it myself...

1000654052.english: Each person has their own destiny.

1000654053.english: The destiny of the True Ancestor is to show the way and guide. And it is the fate of the kin to seek out and offer the bad news!
1000654053.korean: 진조의 운명은 길을 보여주어 인도하는 것. 그리고 비보를 찾아 바치는 것은 권속들의 운명!

1000654054.english: So, Princess of the True Ancestors, trust your familiars.

1000654056.english: When I wake up... ...even stronger... Because...

1000654058.english: Wow, you're completely knocked out, aren't you? You've been wandering around a lot, haven't you?

1000654059.english: All 'worlds' are within the scope of Our affairs.
1000654059.korean: 모든 '세계'는 짐의 사안의 시야 안에 있느니라.

1000654060.english: For the likes of Us to be wandering around in this tiny warehouse is absolutely ridiculous!
1000654060.korean: 그런 짐이 이런 조그마한 창고에서 헤매다니 언어도단!

1000654062.english: Shall we head back soon then? I've packed plenty of chocolate and gold bars too.
1000654062.korean: 그럼 슬슬 복귀할까? 초코랑 금괴도 가득 챙겼고.

1000654063.english: No, it's still there. Didn't you hear what We said just now?
1000654063.korean: 아니, 아직 남아있다. 조금 전 짐의 말을 듣지 못한 것이냐?

1000654064.english: Oh, bad news? I thought you were just saying that to comfort LRL.
1000654064.korean: 아아, 비보? 난 그냥 LRL 달래주려고 한 말인줄 알았는데.

1000654065.english: Oh! You mean that's not all there is to it? Is there anything else left?
1000654065.korean: 오오! 이게 전부가 아니란 말이야? 다른 게 더 남았어?

1000654067.english: Excuse me. Inside there lie limited edition "Dragon Slayer" chocolates and souvenirs.
1000654067.korean: 저기. 저 안에 '드래곤 슬레이어' 한정판 초콜릿과 기념품들이 잠들어있다.

1000654068.english: ... This will be a meaningful gift for this child.

1000654069.english: You didn't mean it from the beginning, did you...?

1000654071.english: Huh... You're a real princess, aren't you?

1000654072.english: ...... There's no respect in that title.

1000654074.english: You, the wrath of the True Ancestor...

1000654075.english: Oh, but who's going to carry LRL? Shall we play rock, paper, scissors?
1000654075.korean: 아, 근데 LRL은 누가 업을래? 가위바위보 할까?

1000654076.english: ...... That child is destined to bear the burden.

1000654078.english: You've been wandering around for a long time, aren't you tired? I can carry you.
1000654078.korean: 오래 헤맸는데 안 피곤해? 내가 업고 가도 돼.

1000654080.english: ... When this child opens their eyes, they'll want Us to be right by their side.
1000654080.korean: ...이 아이가 눈을 떴을 때, 짐이 바로 곁에 있기를 바랄테니까.

1000654083.english: The restoration work in the ecological conservation area has been completed. I can guide you right away if you request it.
1000654083.korean: 생태 보존 구역의 복구 작업이 완료되었습니다. 요청하신다면 바로 안내해 드리겠습니다.

1000654084.english: Oh, is it all over? Friend, let's go take a look!
1000654084.korean: 오, 다 끝난 거야? 친구, 어서 구경하러 가자고.

1000654087.english: Peregrinus, let's have a little chat.
1000654087.korean: 페레그리누스, 우리는 잠시 이야기 좀 하자꾸나.

1000654088.english: What are you talking about? If you do it while you're watching... Aaaah?!
1000654088.korean: 뭔 이야기 말요? 구경하면서 하면- 으아아?!

1000654090.english: - Peregrinus was dragged away by Glacias, who had shrunk considerably.
1000654090.korean: - 페레그리누스는 자기보다 한참 작아진 글라시아스에게 질질 끌려가 버렸다.

1000654092.english: - You definitely said it was a place where you could relax, like a park or a botanical garden.
1000654092.korean: - 분명 공원이나 식물원 같은, 휴식을 취할 수 있는 장소라고 했었지.

1000654094.english: - Mnemosyne blushed slightly and averted her gaze.
1000654094.korean: - 므네모시네는 살짝 얼굴을 붉히며 시선을 피했다.

1000654095.english: This entity... no, when I was wearing this outfit, the analysis of the administrator's actions, pulse, body temperature, and so on...
1000654095.korean: 본 개체… 아니, 제가 이 복장을 입었을 때, 관리자님의 행동과 맥박, 체온 등을 분석한 결과...

1000654096.english: Because the administrator concluded that they 'like me in this outfit'.
1000654096.korean: 관리자님께서 ‘이 복장을 입은 저’를 ‘마음에 들어한다’는 결론을 내렸기 때문입니다.

1000654098.english: - With a smile that had become quite familiar by now, Mnemosyne took my hand.
1000654098.korean: - 이제는 꽤 익숙해진 미소를 지으며 므네모시네는 내 손을 잡았다.

1000654101.english: - A long, straight promenade and a central fountain. Even the blue trees and the wide lawn.
1000654101.korean: - 쭉 뻗은 산책로와, 중앙의 분수. 푸른 가로수들과 넓은 잔디밭까지.

1000654102.english: - Leaving me in awe, Mnemosyne was staring intently at one spot.
1000654102.korean: - 감탄하는 나를 두고 므네모시네는 한 곳을 빤히 바라보고 있었다.

1000654103.english: Record mismatch. We will conduct a comprehensive investigation into the area recovery process.
1000654103.korean: 기록 불일치. 구역 복구 프로세스에 대한 전수조사를 실시합니다.

1000654104.english: That building wasn't originally part of the ecological conservation area. The overall shape of the area is also different from before.
1000654104.korean: 저 건물은 원래 생태 보존 구역에 속한 것이 아닙니다. 구역의 전체적인 형태 또한, 이전과 상이합니다.

1000654105.english: ...detecting code that didn't exist before. No, it's being identified as dummy text, not code. Initiating decryption.
1000654105.korean: ……기존에 존재하지 않던 코드를 감지. 아니, 코드가 아닌 더미 텍스트로 판단됩니다. 해독을 개시합니다.

1000654107.english: - As if flustered, Mnemosyne's eyelashes trembled slightly.
1000654107.korean: - 당황한 듯, 므네모시네의 속눈썹이 가늘게 떨렸다.

1000654108.english: The content is a message for the administrator.

1000654110.english: Cook, that's perfect for Horizon's cafe. It really feels like someone prepared it.
1000654110.korean: 쿡, 호라이즌의 카페로 딱이네요. 꼭 누가 준비해준 것 같아요.

1000654111.english: Hmm... this is better than the one over there... I'll put the mark here, and the menu board outside...
1000654111.korean: 음… 저쪽에 있는 것보다 여기가… 이쪽에 마크를 달고, 바깥에 메뉴판이랑…

1000654112.english: Thetis, is it? What are you doing?

1000654113.english: Oh, Arsenal's captain! Hehe, we're opening a cafe this time. But just by chance, there was this really nice cafe right here.
1000654113.korean: 아, 아스널 대장님! 헤헹, 저희 이번에 카페를 열기로 했거든요. 그런데 마침~ 여기에 이렇게 번듯한 카페가 있는 거예요.

1000654114.english: A cafe... Could you tell me what you plan to sell?
1000654114.korean: 카페라… 어떤 걸 팔 예정인지 들을 수 있겠나?

1000654115.english: That's a secret! But how about you take a look at the special menu instead?
1000654115.korean: 그건 비밀이에요~ 킥, 대신 특별 메뉴 한 번 보실래요?

1000654117.english: It's... a special menu for the perverted commander! ♥
1000654117.korean: 바로… 변태 사령관을 위한 특제 메뉴♥

1000654118.english: Oh, so you're still running the cafe, but you've prepared a special custom menu just for the commander? Interesting.
1000654118.korean: 호오… 카페 영업은 하되, 사령관을 위한 맞춤 메뉴는 따로 준비해둔 건가. 흥미롭군.

1000654119.english: Kyahaha, right? Everyone is still shy, but we're also preparing a group menu that the four of us are working on together, you know?
1000654119.korean: 꺄하핫, 그쵸? 아직 다들 부끄러워하고 있지만, 저희 넷이서 함께 준비하는 단체 메뉴도 준비하고 있다구요~?

1000654120.english: Indeed... this kind of thing must have a unique flavor. Thank you.
1000654120.korean: 과연… 이런 건 색다른 맛이 있겠군. 고맙다.

1000654122.english: Everyone. You shouldn't come in here yet because the scanning work isn't finished.
1000654122.korean: 여러분. 이곳은 아직 스캔 작업이 끝나지 않았으니까 아직 들어오시면 안 됩니다.

1000654125.english: Passed. Hey, want to work on something with me?
1000654125.korean: 합격. 자네, 나랑 일 하나 같이하지.

1000654127.english: We'll need another figurehead. We'll look for employes later...
1000654127.korean: 얼굴마담이 한 명 더 필요하겠군. 종업원은 차차 구해보는 걸로 하고…

1000654128.english: Okay, just a moment! What does "passing" mean?

1000654130.english: Ha, I know how to do it. But why-
1000654130.korean: 하, 할 줄은 알아요. 그런데 왜-

1000654132.english: I can't handle it. Anyway, could you tell me the reason?

1000654133.english: So, are you thinking of practicing?

1000654135.english: That's a shame. But it's good enough as it is now.
1000654135.korean: 아쉽게 됐군. 하지만 지금 상태로도 충분해.

1000654137.english: Oh, yes, sis. Are you finished? Yes. As you said, I will convey it to Master first.
1000654137.korean: 아, 네, 언니. 완료됐나요? 네. 말씀대로 주인님에게 먼저 전달 드릴게요.

1000654138.english: Yes. Yes, I'll buy snacks for my siblings and go home early. Yes, sis.
1000654138.korean: 네. 네, 동생들 간식 사서 일찍 들어갈게요. 네, 언니.

1000654139.english: Hmm, I'll need to renovate the interior a bit. It seems difficult to make the stage too big.
1000654139.korean: 흠, 내부를 좀 개조해야겠군. 무대를 너무 크게 만들기는 어려워 보여.

1000654140.english: Arsenal captain. I don't understand what you're saying, but I'll be going to see my master now.
1000654140.korean: 아스널 대장님. 무슨 말씀이신지 모르겠지만, 저는 이만 주인님께 가보겠습니다.

1000654143.english: The atmosphere seemed a bit strange. It seems you have something on your mind.
1000654143.korean: 어째 분위기가 심상치 않더군. 고민이 생긴 모양이야.

1000654144.english: Then, even more quickly, go and... that's... Glacias-san...?
1000654144.korean: 그러면 더더욱 빨리 가서- 저건... 글라시아스 님...?

1000654145.english: ... But did the Arsenal captain hear something?

1000654148.english: It's the feeling of someone you've been intimate with countless times.
1000654148.korean: 셀 수 없이 몸을 섞은 상대의 감이다.

1000654149.english: Again, again you say such things...!

1000654150.english: Does it sound like a joke?

1000654152.english: Whether human or android, the moment we embrace each other as we are born, we become most honest. Isn't that right?
1000654152.korean: 인간이든 바이오로이드든, 태어난 모습 그대로 함께 몸을 맞대는 순간 가장 솔직해지지. 그렇지 않나?

1000654154.english: If you keep repeating that, a certain moment will come. You start to be able to roughly understand what someone is thinking just by their small gestures, changes in expression, or the sound of their voice.
1000654154.korean: 그걸 반복하다 보면 어떤 순간이 온다. 상대의 작은 몸짓, 표정 변화, 목소리만 듣고도 무슨 생각을 하고 있는지 대충 알 수 있게 되지.

1000654155.english: You can call it superstition if you want. Because I think so.
1000654155.korean: 미신이라고 해도 좋다. 난 그렇다고 생각하니까.

1000654156.english: ...I think I understand a little bit too.

1000654157.english: A little? You're still a long way off.

1000654158.english: How is it? If we work together, I'll show you what true love is.
1000654158.korean: 어떤가? 함께 일한다면 내가 자네에게 진정한 사랑이 무엇인지 알려주지.

1000654159.english: I'm not doing it! And I've already- ugh...
1000654159.korean: 안 한다구욧! 그리고 전 이미- 읏…

1000654161.english: Haha, feel free to contact me anytime if you change your mind.

1000654163.english: I don't know what you're worried about, but... I hope you overcome it, my friend.
1000654163.korean: 무슨 고민인지는 모르겠지만… 모쪼록 이겨내길 바란다, 그대여.

1000654164.english: The content is a message for the administrator.

1000654166.english: - The front part of the foot, a section of the lawn, rose up, unfolded, and became a terminal. As Mnemosyne manipulated the screen a few times, a short letter soon appeared.
1000654166.korean: - 발 앞쪽, 잔디밭 일부가 솟아오르더니 펼쳐져서 단말이 되었다. 므네모시네가 화면을 몇 번 조작하자 곧, 짧은 편지가 나타났다.

1000654167.english: Did you enjoy your life as a jobless person? This is all I can do for you right now.
1000654167.korean: 백수 생활은 좀 즐겼나요? 지금 내가 해줄 수 있는 건 이정도예요.

1000654168.english: I won't say I'm sorry. We're doing our best in our own way too.
1000654168.korean: 미안하다고는 하지 않을게요. 우리도 나름대로 최선을 다하고 있는 거니까.

1000654169.english: Still... I hope this everyday life has been a gift to you, even if just a little. I'm serious. Whether you believe it or not is entirely your choice.
1000654169.korean: 그래도… 당신에게 이 일상이 조금이나마 선물이 됐으면 좋겠네요. 진심이에요. 믿고 안 믿고는 당신 선택하기 나름이지만.

1000654170.english: Anyway, when we meet again, I think we'll be able to have a more proper conversation. Our doctor is actually making some progress. Then, have a good rest of your vacation.
1000654170.korean: 어쨌든, 다시 만날 때는 좀 더 제대로 된 이야기를 나눌 수도 있을 것 같아요. 우리 박사님이 나름 성과를 내고 있거든요. 그럼 휴가, 마저 잘 보내요.

1000654172.english: P.S. I almost forgot the most important thing. Happy early third birthday! Sincerely.
1000654172.korean: P.S. 제일 중요한 말을 잊을뻔했네요. 곧 있을 세 번째 생일, 미리 축하해요. 진심으로.

1000654173.english: - With it being this blatant, anyone would notice. The first woman in the Bible, Eve. Another name is Eve, or...
1000654173.korean: - 이렇게 노골적이어서야 누구라도 눈치채겠지. 성경에 등장하는 첫 번째 여성, 하와. 다른 이름은 이브, 혹은…

1000654174.english: - And the name I heard when I entered the ark, Abel. Born between the first man and the first woman... the second son.
1000654174.korean: - 그리고 방주에 들어와서 들었던 나의 인식명, 아벨. 첫 번째 남성과 첫 번째 여성 사이에서 태어난… 둘째 아들.

1000654175.english: - If the Ark's special privileges were also Eva's doing, just like she left this message.
1000654175.korean: - 이 메시지를 남겨 놓은 것처럼, 방주의 특급 권한도 에바가 손을 써둔 것이라면.

1000654176.english: - I exhale, calming my rapidly beating heart. If you think about it calmly, this is also circumstantial evidence, or rather, it's just Eva claiming it.
1000654176.korean: - 숨을 내뱉어 세차게 뛰는 가슴을 진정시킨다. 냉정히 생각해보면 이것도 심증, 아니 에바가 그렇게 주장하는 것에 지나지 않는다.

1000654177.english: - I don't even know how or where I was born, but one thing is certain.
1000654177.korean: - 나는 내가 어떻게, 어디서 태어났는지도 모르지만 한 가지만은 확실하다.

1000654178.english: - My current 'life' began in a pit somewhere, when I met the griffon and Constantia.
1000654178.korean: - 지금의 내 ‘삶’은… 어딘가의 구덩이에서, 그리폰과 콘스탄챠를 만나며 시작되었다는 것.

1000654179.english: - Questions about the existence of 'myself,' which I had forgotten for a while, resurfaced.
1000654179.korean: - 한동안 잊고 지냈던 ‘나’라는 존재에 대한 의문이 떠올랐다.

1000654180.english: - No, perhaps I was unconsciously avoiding thinking about it. Just like LRL didn't ask if there was a Cyclops Princess.
1000654180.korean: - 아니, 어쩌면 무의식적으로 생각하는 것을 피하고 있었을지도 모른다. LRL이 사이클롭스 프린세스도 있는지 물어보지 않았던 것처럼.

1000654181.english: - Once a question surfaces, it continues to multiply. Where did my knowledge of Iron Blooded come from?
1000654181.korean: - 한번 수면 위로 올라온 의문은 꼬리에 꼬리를 물고 계속된다. 내 철충에 대한 지식은 어디에서 온 거지?

1000654182.english: - Why was I, who lacked even common sense, able to excel at battle command?
1000654182.korean: - 상식도 부족했던 내가, 전투 지휘만큼은 잘 할 수 있었던 이유는?

1000654183.english: - Why was I infected with the Iron Plague?

1000654186.english: Oh, yeah. I'll ask right away.

1000654187.english: So that's why you came wearing that outfit?
1000654187.korean: 그래서 그 옷 입고 온 거야?

1000654188.english: Yeah. I like it because it suits Mnemosyne well.
1000654188.korean: 응. 므네모시네한테 잘 어울려서 마음에 들어.
